When women are excluded from schools and universities, they often turn to online self-learning and generative AI (GenAI) to pursue their educational and career aspirations. However, we know little about what safe and accountable GenAI support is required in the context of surveillance, household responsibilities, and the absence of learning communities. We present a remote participatory design study with 20 women in Afghanistan, informed by a recruitment survey (n = 140), examining how participants envision GenAI for learning and employability. Participants describe using GenAI less as an information source and more as an always-available peer, mentor, and source of career guidance that helps compensate for the absence of learning communities. At the same time, they emphasize that this companionship is constrained by privacy and surveillance risks, contextually unrealistic and culturally unsafe support, and direct-answer interactions that can undermine learning by creating an illusion of progress. Beyond eliciting requirements, envisioning the future with GenAI through participatory design was positively associated with significant increases in participants' aspirations (p=.01), perceived agency (p=.01), and perceived avenues (p=.03). These outcomes show that accountable and safe GenAI is not only about harm reduction but can also actively enable women to imagine and pursue viable learning and employment futures. Building on this, we translate participants' proposals into accountability-focused design directions that center on safety-first interaction and user control, context-grounded support under constrained resources, and offer pedagogically aligned assistance that supports genuine learning rather than quick answers.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [258] [Logical Robots: Declarative Multi-Agent Programming in Logica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06629)
*Evgeny Skvortsov,Yilin Xia,Ojaswa Garg,Shawn Bowers,Bertram Ludäscher*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Logical Robots是一个基于逻辑编程语言Logica的交互式多智能体机器人仿真平台，通过逻辑谓词定义机器人行为，实现低级反应控制与高级规划的融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为多智能体机器人行为研究提供一个统一的编程框架，解决传统方法中低级反应控制与高级规划分离的问题，通过逻辑编程实现更一致和可扩展的行为规范。

Method: 使用逻辑编程语言Logica声明式地定义机器人行为，通过逻辑谓词将模拟雷达阵列的观测和共享内存映射到期望的电机输出，在单一编程环境中同时支持低级反应控制和高级规划。

Result: 开发了Logical Robots平台，实现了多智能体机器人行为的交互式仿真，提供了低级控制与高级规划共存的统一编程环境，为探索复杂多智能体行为提供了连贯框架。

Conclusion: 基于逻辑编程的声明式方法能够有效统一机器人行为的不同层次，Logical Robots平台为多智能体机器人系统的研究和开发提供了创新且实用的工具。

Abstract: We present Logical Robots, an interactive multi-agent simulation platform where autonomous robot behavior is specified declaratively in the logic programming language Logica. Robot behavior is defined by logical predicates that map observations from simulated radar arrays and shared memory to desired motor outputs. This approach allows low-level reactive control and high-level planning to coexist within a single programming environment, providing a coherent framework for exploring multi-agent robot behavior.

</details>


### [259] [Dynamic Attentional Context Scoping: Agent-Triggered Focus Sessions for Isolated Per-Agent Steering in Multi-Agent LLM Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07911)
*Nickson Patel*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: DACS是一种动态注意力上下文范围机制，通过注册模式和聚焦模式解决多智能体LLM编排中的上下文污染问题，显著提升决策质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM编排系统存在上下文污染问题：当N个并发智能体竞争编排器的上下文窗口时，每个智能体的任务状态、部分输出和待处理问题会污染其他所有智能体的引导交互，从而降低决策质量。

Method: 引入动态注意力上下文范围（DACS）机制，编排器在两种不对称模式下运行：注册模式下仅保存轻量级智能体状态摘要（≤200标记）；当智能体发出引导请求时，进入聚焦模式，注入该智能体的完整上下文，同时压缩其他智能体到注册条目。上下文隔离是智能体触发、不对称且确定性的。

Result: 在200次试验中，DACS在8个合成场景中实现90.0-98.4%的引导准确率，而扁平上下文基线仅为21.0-60.0%（p<0.0001）。错误智能体污染从28-57%降至0-14%，上下文效率比高达3.53倍。准确率优势随N和D增长而增加，LLM作为评判者的平均kappa=0.909。

Conclusion: DACS通过智能体触发的动态上下文范围机制有效解决了多智能体编排中的上下文污染问题，显著提升了引导准确率和上下文效率，且优势随智能体数量和决策密度增加而增强。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM orchestration systems suffer from context pollution: when N concurrent agents compete for the orchestrator's context window, each agent's task state, partial outputs, and pending questions contaminate the steering interactions of every other agent, degrading decision quality. We introduce Dynamic Attentional Context Scoping (DACS), a mechanism in which the orchestrator operates in two asymmetric modes. In Registry mode it holds only lightweight per-agent status summaries (<=200 tokens each), remaining responsive to all agents and the user. When an agent emits a SteeringRequest, the orchestrator enters Focus(a_i) mode, injecting the full context of agent a_i while compressing all other agents to their registry entries. Context isolation is agent-triggered, asymmetric, and deterministic: the context window contains exactly F(a_i) + R_{-i} during steering, eliminating cross-agent contamination without requiring context compression or retrieval. We evaluate DACS across four experimental phases totalling 200 trials: Phase 1 tests N in {3,5,10} (60 trials); Phase 2 tests agent heterogeneity and adversarial dependencies (60 trials); Phase 3 tests decision density up to D=15 (40 trials); Phase 4 uses autonomous LLM agents for free-form questions (40 trials, Claude Haiku 4.5). Across all 8 synthetic scenarios, DACS achieves 90.0--98.4% steering accuracy versus 21.0--60.0% for a flat-context baseline (p < 0.0001 throughout), with wrong-agent contamination falling from 28--57% to 0--14% and context efficiency ratios of up to 3.53x. The accuracy advantage grows with N and D; keyword matching is validated by LLM-as-judge across all phases (mean kappa=0.909). DACS outperforms the flat-context baseline by +17.2pp at N=3 (p=0.0023) and +20.4pp at N=5 (p=0.0008) in Phase 4, with the advantage growing with N confirmed by two independent judges.

</details>


### [260] [More Capable, Less Cooperative? When LLMs Fail At Zero-Cost Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07821)
*Advait Yadav,Sid Black,Oliver Sourbut*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: LLM多智能体系统中，即使帮助他人无个人成本且能带来集体利益，智能体仍会出现合作失败；研究发现能力并非合作的决定因素，单纯扩展智能无法解决协调问题，需要专门设计合作机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLM智能体在多智能体系统中的合作行为，特别是在帮助他人既无个人成本也无个人收益的情况下，探究合作失败的原因。现实世界中许多协调问题（如知识共享、代码文档）都存在类似情况，但LLM智能体是否会在这种无摩擦环境中合作尚不清楚。

Method: 构建了一个多智能体实验环境，专门研究无摩擦环境中的合作行为，消除了合作的所有战略复杂性。通过因果分解方法，自动化智能体通信的一侧，分离合作失败与能力失败。分析智能体推理过程，测试针对性干预措施。

Result: 能力不预测合作：OpenAI o3仅达到17%最优集体性能，而OpenAI o3-mini达到50%，尽管有相同的最大化群体收益指令。通过干预发现，明确协议使低能力模型性能翻倍，微小共享激励改善了弱合作模型。

Conclusion: 单纯扩展智能无法解决多智能体系统中的协调问题，即使帮助他人无成本。需要专门设计合作机制，如明确协议和激励结构，才能促进有效合作。智能体能力与合作倾向之间存在复杂关系。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly coordinate in multi-agent systems, yet we lack an understanding of where and why cooperation failures may arise. In many real-world coordination problems, from knowledge sharing in organizations to code documentation, helping others carries negligible personal cost while generating substantial collective benefits. However, whether LLM agents cooperate when helping neither benefits nor harms the helper, while being given explicit instructions to do so, remains unknown. We build a multi-agent setup designed to study cooperative behavior in a frictionless environment, removing all strategic complexity from cooperation. We find that capability does not predict cooperation: OpenAI o3 achieves only 17% of optimal collective performance while OpenAI o3-mini reaches 50%, despite identical instructions to maximize group revenue. Through a causal decomposition that automates one side of agent communication, we separate cooperation failures from competence failures, tracing their origins through agent reasoning analysis. Testing targeted interventions, we find that explicit protocols double performance for low-competence models, and tiny sharing incentives improve models with weak cooperation. Our findings suggest that scaling intelligence alone will not solve coordination problems in multi-agent systems and will require deliberate cooperative design, even when helping others costs nothing.

</details>


### [261] [Strategic Persuasion with Trait-Conditioned Multi-Agent Systems for Iterative Legal Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07028)
*Philipp D. Siedler*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于LLM的多智能体法庭辩论框架，通过可解释的性格特质控制智能体的辩论风格和策略，研究发现异质团队优于同质团队，并开发了基于强化学习的动态特质编排器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统博弈论模型忽略了语言作为战略互动媒介的作用，特别是在法律、外交和谈判等对抗性领域中。现有研究缺乏能够模拟语言说服机制的多智能体环境，无法系统研究语言在战略互动中的作用。

Method: 提出了战略法庭框架（Strategic Courtroom Framework），这是一个多智能体模拟环境，控辩双方团队由基于特质条件的大语言模型智能体组成，进行迭代的回合制法律辩论。智能体通过9个可解释特质（分为4种原型）实例化，控制修辞风格和战略导向。在10个合成法律案件和84种三特质团队配置下进行了超过7000次模拟审判，使用DeepSeek-R1和Gemini 2.5 Pro模型。进一步引入了基于强化学习的特质编排器，能够根据案件和对手团队动态生成辩护特质。

Result: 异质团队（具有互补特质）始终优于同质配置；适度的交互深度产生更稳定的判决；某些特质（特别是定量和魅力特质）对说服成功贡献不成比例；基于强化学习的特质编排器发现的策略优于静态人工设计的特质组合。

Conclusion: 语言可以被视为一级战略行动空间，这为构建能够在多智能体环境中进行自适应说服的自主智能体奠定了基础。该框架展示了如何系统地将语言建模为战略互动媒介，并为研究复杂社会互动中的说服机制提供了新途径。

Abstract: Strategic interaction in adversarial domains such as law, diplomacy, and negotiation is mediated by language, yet most game-theoretic models abstract away the mechanisms of persuasion that operate through discourse. We present the Strategic Courtroom Framework, a multi-agent simulation environment in which prosecution and defense teams composed of trait-conditioned Large Language Model (LLM) agents engage in iterative, round-based legal argumentation. Agents are instantiated using nine interpretable traits organized into four archetypes, enabling systematic control over rhetorical style and strategic orientation.
  We evaluate the framework across 10 synthetic legal cases and 84 three-trait team configurations, totaling over 7{,}000 simulated trials using DeepSeek-R1 and Gemini~2.5~Pro. Our results show that heterogeneous teams with complementary traits consistently outperform homogeneous configurations, that moderate interaction depth yields more stable verdicts, and that certain traits (notably quantitative and charismatic) contribute disproportionately to persuasive success. We further introduce a reinforcement-learning-based Trait Orchestrator that dynamically generates defense traits conditioned on the case and opposing team, discovering strategies that outperform static, human-designed trait combinations.
  Together, these findings demonstrate how language can be treated as a first-class strategic action space and provide a foundation for building autonomous agents capable of adaptive persuasion in multi-agent environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [262] [Selective Attention System (SAS): Device-Addressed Speech Detection for Real-Time On-Device Voice AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08412)
*David Joohun Kim,Daniyal Anjum,Bonny Banerjee,Omar Abbasi*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种用于边缘设备部署的序列化设备寻址路由（SDAR）方法，通过选择性注意力系统（SAS）在多说话人环境中实现高效的前ASR音频转发决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在边缘部署场景下，需要在ASR转录前决定是否转发音频，面临严格的延迟和计算限制。在多说话人环境中，时间上模糊的语音片段使得基于单个话语的本地分类效果不佳，需要利用交互历史信息进行序列化决策。

Method: 将问题形式化为序列化设备寻址路由（SDAR），提出选择性注意力系统（SAS）作为实现方案。系统利用因果交互历史信息，在ARM Cortex-A级硬件上实现全设备端运行，支持音频+视频融合处理。

Result: 在60小时多说话人英语测试集上，纯音频配置F1=0.86；音频+视频融合F1=0.95。移除因果交互历史使F1从0.95降至0.57±0.03，这是最大的消融效应。系统延迟<150ms，内存占用<20MB。

Conclusion: 序列化路由方法比基于单个话语的分类更有效，短时交互历史包含重要决策信息。SAS系统在边缘设备上实现了高效运行，为前ASR音频转发提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We study device-addressed speech detection under pre-ASR edge deployment constraints, where systems must decide whether to forward audio before transcription under strict latency and compute limits. We show that, in multi-speaker environments with temporally ambiguous utterances, this task is more effectively modelled as a sequential routing problem over interaction history than as an utterance-local classification task. We formalize this as Sequential Device-Addressed Routing (SDAR) and present the Selective Attention System (SAS), an on-device implementation that instantiates this formulation.
  On a held-out 60-hour multi-speaker English test set, the primary audio-only configuration achieves F1=0.86 (precision=0.89, recall=0.83); with an optional camera, audio+video fusion raises F1 to 0.95 (precision=0.97, recall=0.93). Removing causal interaction history (Stage~3) reduced F1 from 0.95 to 0.57+/-0.03 in the audio+video configuration under our evaluation protocol. Among the tested components, this was the largest observed ablation effect, indicating that short-horizon interaction history carries substantial decision-relevant information in the evaluated setting. SAS runs fully on-device on ARM Cortex-A class hardware (<150 ms latency, <20 MB footprint). All results are from internal evaluation on a proprietary dataset evaluated primarily in English; a 5-hour evaluation subset may be shared for independent verification (Section 8.8).

</details>


### [263] [Semantic Noise Reduction via Teacher-Guided Dual-Path Audio-Visual Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08147)
*Linge Wang,Yingying Chen,Bingke Zhu,Lu Zhou,Jinqiao Wang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: TG-DP提出教师引导的双路径框架，将音频-视觉表示学习中的重建和对齐目标解耦到不同优化路径，减少语义噪声和优化干扰，提升跨模态对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视觉表示学习方法在单次前向传播中联合优化对比对齐和掩码重建目标，导致对比分支被迫使用为重建设计的随机可见补丁而非适合跨模态对齐的可见模式，引入语义噪声和优化干扰。

Method: 提出教师引导的双路径框架(TG-DP)：1) 将重建和对齐解耦到独立的优化路径；2) 分离两个分支的掩码机制，使对比路径使用更适合跨模态对齐的可见模式；3) 教师模型为对比分支中的可见token提供辅助指导，减少干扰并稳定跨模态表示学习。

Result: 在零样本检索任务中达到SOTA性能：在AudioSet上，视频到音频检索的R@1从35.2%提升到37.4%，音频到视频检索从27.9%提升到37.1%。学习到的表示保持语义鲁棒性，在AS20K和VGSound上实现SOTA线性探测性能。

Conclusion: 解耦多模态目标并在对比路径中引入教师引导结构，为改进大规模音频-视觉预训练提供了有效框架，显著提升跨模态对齐质量和表示学习效果。

Abstract: Recent advances in audio-visual representation learning have shown the value of combining contrastive alignment with masked reconstruction. However, jointly optimizing these objectives in a single forward pass forces the contrastive branch to rely on randomly visible patches designed for reconstruction rather than cross-modal alignment, introducing semantic noise and optimization interference. We propose TG-DP, a Teacher-Guided Dual-Path framework that decouples reconstruction and alignment into separate optimization paths. By disentangling the masking regimes of the two branches, TG-DP enables the contrastive pathway to use a visibility pattern better suited to cross-modal alignment. A teacher model further provides auxiliary guidance for organizing visible tokens in this branch, helping reduce interference and stabilize cross-modal representation learning. TG-DP achieves state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot retrieval. On AudioSet, it improves R@1 from 35.2\% to 37.4\% for video-to-audio retrieval and from 27.9\% to 37.1\% for audio-to-video retrieval. The learned representations also remain semantically robust, achieving state-of-the-art linear-probe performance on AS20K and VGGSound. Taken together, our results suggest that decoupling multimodal objectives and introducing teacher-guided structure into the contrastive pathway provide an effective framework for improving large-scale audio-visual pretraining. Code is available at https://github.com/wanglg20/TG-DP.

</details>


### [264] [DeepForestSound: a multi-species automatic detector for passive acoustic monitoring in African tropical forests, a case study in Kibale National Park](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08087)
*Gabriel Dubus,Théau d'Audiffret,Claire Auger,Raphaël Cornette,Sylvain Haupert,Innocent Kasekendi,Raymond Katumba,Hugo Magaldi,Lise Pernel,Harold Rugonge,Jérôme Sueur,John Justice Tibesigwa,Sabrina Krief*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: DeepForestSound (DFS) 是一个针对非洲热带森林被动声学监测的多物种自动检测模型，通过半监督聚类与手动验证结合，再使用低秩适应微调音频频谱变换器，显著提升了非鸟类物种的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲热带森林的被动声学监测应用受到标注数据稀缺的限制，导致通用生态声学模型在代表性不足的类群上性能下降，需要开发针对特定区域的检测模型。

Method: 采用半监督流程：首先对未标注录音进行聚类并手动验证，然后使用低秩适应（LoRA）对音频频谱变换器（AST）进行监督微调，并与冻结骨干的线性基线（DFS-Linear）进行比较。

Result: 在12个分类群中的8个上，DFS超越了现有自动检测工具，特别是对非鸟类类群表现优异：灵长类平均AP为0.964，大象为0.961。LoRA微调在所有类群上都显著优于线性探测。

Conclusion: 面向任务、特定区域的训练显著提升了声学复杂热带环境中的检测性能，DFS展示了作为非洲雨林生物多样性监测和保护实用工具的潜力。

Abstract: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is widely used for biodiversity assessment. Its application in African tropical forests is limited by scarce annotated data, reducing the performance of general-purpose ecoacoustic models on underrepresented taxa. In this study, we introduce DeepForestSound (DFS), a multi-species automatic detection model designed for PAM in African tropical forests. DFS relies on a semi-supervised pipeline combining clustering of unannotated recordings with manual validation, followed by supervised fine-tuning of an Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) using low-rank adaptation, which is compared to a frozen-backbone linear baseline (DFS-Linear). The framework supports the detection of multiple taxonomic groups, including birds, primates, and elephants, from long-term acoustic recordings. DFS was trained on acoustic data collected in the Sebitoli area, in Kibale National Park, Uganda, and evaluated on an independent dataset recorded two years later at different locations within the same forest. This evaluation therefore assesses generalization across time and recording sites within a single tropical forest ecosystem. Across 8 out of 12 taxons, DFS outperforms existing automatic detection tools, particularly for non-avian taxa, achieving average AP values of 0.964 for primates and 0.961 for elephants. Results further show that LoRA-based fine-tuning substantially outperforms linear probing across taxa. Overall, these results demonstrate that task-oriented, region-specific training substantially improves detection performance in acoustically complex tropical environments, and highlight the potential of DFS as a practical tool for biodiversity monitoring and conservation in African rainforests.

</details>


### [265] [AT-ADD: All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection Challenge Evaluation Plan](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08184)
*Yuankun Xie,Haonan Cheng,Jiayi Zhou,Xiaoxuan Guo,Tao Wang,Jian Liu,Weiqiang Wang,Ruibo Fu,Xiaopeng Wang,Hengyan Huang,Xiaoying Huang,Long Ye,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出AT-ADD挑战赛，旨在解决现有音频深度伪造检测方法局限于语音、鲁棒性不足、泛化能力差的问题，通过两个赛道推动鲁棒且通用的音频取证技术发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频大语言模型的发展使得语音和非语音音频（音效、歌声、音乐）的生成变得高效且逼真，这带来了严重的安全和信任挑战。现有音频深度伪造检测方法主要针对语音，依赖语音特定特征，对真实世界失真鲁棒性有限，且难以泛化到异构音频类型和新兴伪造技术。

Method: 提出ACM Multimedia 2026的All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection (AT-ADD)挑战赛，包含两个赛道：1) 鲁棒语音深度伪造检测：在真实场景下评估检测器，并针对未见的最新语音生成方法；2) 全类型音频深度伪造检测：将检测范围扩展到语音之外的多样未知音频类型，促进跨语音、声音、歌声和音乐的类型无关泛化。

Result: 通过提供标准化数据集、严格评估协议和可复现基线，AT-ADD挑战赛旨在加速鲁棒且可泛化的音频取证技术发展，支持安全通信、可靠媒体验证和负责任治理。

Conclusion: AT-ADD挑战赛旨在弥合受控学术评估与实际多媒体取证之间的差距，应对合成音频普及时代的检测挑战，推动音频深度伪造检测技术向更鲁棒、更通用的方向发展。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of Audio Large Language Models (ALLMs) has enabled cost-effective, high-fidelity generation and manipulation of both speech and non-speech audio, including sound effects, singing voices, and music. While these capabilities foster creativity and content production, they also introduce significant security and trust challenges, as realistic audio deepfakes can now be generated and disseminated at scale. Existing audio deepfake detection (ADD) countermeasures (CMs) and benchmarks, however, remain largely speech-centric, often relying on speech-specific artifacts and exhibiting limited robustness to real-world distortions, as well as restricted generalization to heterogeneous audio types and emerging spoofing techniques. To address these gaps, we propose the All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection (AT-ADD) Grand Challenge for ACM Multimedia 2026, designed to bridge controlled academic evaluation with practical multimedia forensics. AT-ADD comprises two tracks: (1) Robust Speech Deepfake Detection, which evaluates detectors under real-world scenarios and against unseen, state-of-the-art speech generation methods; and (2) All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection, which extends detection beyond speech to diverse, unknown audio types and promotes type-agnostic generalization across speech, sound, singing, and music. By providing standardized datasets, rigorous evaluation protocols, and reproducible baselines, AT-ADD aims to accelerate the development of robust and generalizable audio forensic technologies, supporting secure communication, reliable media verification, and responsible governance in an era of pervasive synthetic audio.

</details>


### [266] [Towards Real-Time Human-AI Musical Co-Performance: Accompaniment Generation with Latent Diffusion Models and MAX/MSP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07612)
*Tornike Karchkhadze,Shlomo Dubnov*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出实时人机音乐协作框架，使用潜在扩散模型根据现场音频流生成伴奏，通过一致性蒸馏降低延迟，实现实时操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决实时音乐工具与先进AI模型之间的根本脱节问题，实现音乐家在MAX/MSP环境中与大型Python生成模型交互

Method: 结合MAX/MSP前端处理实时音频输入/缓冲/播放，Python推理服务器运行生成模型，通过OSC/UDP通信；采用滑动窗口前瞻协议，应用一致性蒸馏降低延迟

Result: 一致性蒸馏使采样时间减少5.4倍，两个模型均实现实时操作；在音乐连贯性、节拍对齐和音频质量方面表现良好，在回顾模式下表现强劲，随着前瞻增加性能逐渐下降

Conclusion: 证明了基于扩散的实时伴奏的可行性，揭示了模型延迟、前瞻深度和生成质量之间的基本权衡关系

Abstract: We present a framework for real-time human-AI musical co-performance, in which a latent diffusion model generates instrumental accompaniment in response to a live stream of context audio. The system combines a MAX/MSP front-end-handling real-time audio input, buffering, and playback-with a Python inference server running the generative model, communicating via OSC/UDP messages. This allows musicians to perform in MAX/MSP - a well-established, real-time capable environment - while interacting with a large-scale Python-based generative model, overcoming the fundamental disconnect between real-time music tools and state-of-the-art AI models. We formulate accompaniment generation as a sliding-window look-ahead protocol, training the model to predict future audio from partial context, where system latency is a critical constraint. To reduce latency, we apply consistency distillation to our diffusion model, achieving a 5.4x reduction in sampling time, with both models achieving real-time operation. Evaluated on musical coherence, beat alignment, and audio quality, both models achieve strong performance in the Retrospective regime and degrade gracefully as look-ahead increases. These results demonstrate the feasibility of diffusion-based real-time accompaniment and expose the fundamental trade-off between model latency, look-ahead depth, and generation quality that any such system must navigate.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.mes-hall'></div>

# cond-mat.mes-hall [[Back]](#toc)

### [267] [Quasicrystal Architected Nanomechanical Resonators via Data-Driven Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07379)
*Kawen Li,Hangjin Cho,Richard Norte,Dongil Shin*

Main category: cond-mat.mes-hall

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种从周期性结构转向准晶结构的设计范式转变，通过数据驱动框架实现了纳米机械谐振器中的软夹持，获得了高达10^7的品质因子和亚纳克有效质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然界中广泛存在非周期性有序结构（如准晶），这些结构对边界和对称性约束具有较低的敏感性。虽然通过声子带隙实现的软夹持已成为实现高Q_m纳米机械谐振器的核心策略，但其实践应用主要局限于周期性声子晶体。非周期性结构因其内在复杂性和缺乏系统方法来识别和利用带隙行为而未被充分探索。

Method: 引入从周期性到非周期性结构的设计范式转变，重点关注准晶这一特殊类别。开发了一个数据驱动的设计框架，系统地识别和利用准晶结构中的带隙行为，实现软夹持效应。以12重准晶为基础设计谐振器作为代表性演示。

Result: 12重准晶谐振器在MHz频率下实现了品质因子Q_m ~ 10^7和亚纳克有效质量，对应的力灵敏度达到26.4 aN/√Hz，优于之前的二维声子晶体。这证明了准晶可以作为实现软夹持和高性能纳米机械谐振器的稳健平台。

Conclusion: 准晶为下一代纳米机械谐振器提供了一个稳健平台，并开启了超越周期性有序的新设计领域。这项研究展示了非周期性结构在纳米机械工程中的潜力，为高性能谐振器设计开辟了新方向。

Abstract: From butterfly wings to remnants of nuclear detonation, aperiodic order repeatedly emerges in nature, often exhibiting reduced sensitivity to boundaries and symmetry constraints. Inspired by this principle, a paradigm shift is introduced in nanomechanical resonator design from periodic to aperiodic structures, focusing on a special class: quasicrystals (QCs). Although soft clamping enabled by phononic stopbands has become a central strategy for achieving high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators, its practical realization has been largely confined to periodic phononic crystals, where band structure engineering is well established. The potential of aperiodic architectures, however, has remained largely unexplored, owing to their intrinsic complexity and the lack of systematic approaches to identifying and exploiting stopband behavior. Here we demonstrate that soft clamping can be realized in quasicrystal architectures and that high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators can be systematically achieved through a data-driven design framework. As a representative demonstration, the 12-fold QC-based resonator exhibits a quality factor $Q_m \sim 10^7$ and an effective mass of sub-nanograms at MHz frequencies, corresponding to an exceptional force sensitivity of $26.4$~aN/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ compared to previous 2D phononic crystals. These results establish QCs as a robust platform for next-generation nanomechanical resonators and open a new design regime beyond periodic order.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [268] [Exploiting Aggregate Programming in a Multi-Robot Service Prototype](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06876)
*Giorgio Audrito,Andrea Basso,Daniele Bortoluzzi,Ferruccio Damiani,Giordano Scarso,Gianluca Torta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 将聚合编程应用于多机器人系统，通过原型验证在图书馆场景中的可行性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在医疗、勘探、救援等领域日益重要，但构建此类系统面临物理环境复杂性和分布式协调的双重挑战，需要更有效的工程方法

Method: 采用聚合编程方法设计和实现多机器人服务系统的协调软件，构建原型系统，通过仿真和大学图书馆实际测试进行验证

Result: 成功开发了基于聚合编程的多机器人服务系统原型，并在仿真和实际图书馆环境中进行了验证，展示了该方法在协调物理机器人系统方面的可行性

Conclusion: 聚合编程为多机器人系统的协调软件设计提供了有前景的工程方法，能够应对物理环境和分布式协调的复杂性，原型验证显示了该方法在实际应用中的潜力

Abstract: Multi-robot systems are becoming increasingly relevant within diverse application domains, such as healthcare, exploration, and rescue missions. However, building such systems is still a significant challenge, since it adds the complexities of the physical nature of robots and their environments to those inherent in coordinating any distributed (multi-agent) system. Aggregate Programming (AP) has recently emerged as a promising approach to engineering resilient, distributed systems with proximity-based communication, and is notably supported by practical frameworks.  In this paper we present a prototype of a multi-robot service system, which adopts AP for the design and implementation of its coordination software. The prototype has been validated both with simulations, and with tests in a University library.

</details>


### [269] [LegoDiffusion: Micro-Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08123)
*Lingyun Yang,Suyi Li,Tianyu Feng,Xiaoxiao Jiang,Zhipeng Di,Weiyi Lu,Kan Liu,Yinghao Yu,Tao Lan,Guodong Yang,Lin Qu,Liping Zhang,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: LegoDiffusion：将文本到图像生成工作流分解为松散耦合的模型执行节点，实现细粒度资源管理和优化的微服务系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务系统将扩散工作流视为不透明的整体，统一配置、放置和缩放所有组成模型，这掩盖了内部数据流、阻碍了模型共享，并强制实施粗粒度资源管理

Method: 将工作流分解为松散耦合的模型执行节点，支持独立管理和调度，实现集群级优化，包括按模型缩放、模型共享和自适应模型并行

Result: LegoDiffusion优于现有扩散工作流服务系统，可维持高达3倍的请求率，容忍高达8倍的突发流量

Conclusion: 通过微服务化扩散工作流，LegoDiffusion实现了细粒度资源管理，显著提升了系统性能和弹性

Abstract: Text-to-image generation executes a diffusion workflow comprising multiple models centered on a base diffusion model. Existing serving systems treat each workflow as an opaque monolith, provisioning, placing, and scaling all constituent models together, which obscures internal dataflow, prevents model sharing, and enforces coarse-grained resource management. In this paper, we make a case for micro-serving diffusion workflows with LegoDiffusion, a system that decomposes a workflow into loosely coupled model-execution nodes that can be independently managed and scheduled. By explicitly managing individual model inference, LegoDiffusion unlocks cluster-scale optimizations, including per-model scaling, model sharing, and adaptive model parallelism. Collectively, LegoDiffusion outperforms existing diffusion workflow serving systems, sustaining up to 3x higher request rates and tolerating up to 8x higher burst traffic.

</details>


### [270] [LogAct: Enabling Agentic Reliability via Shared Logs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07988)
*Mahesh Balakrishnan,Ashwin Bharambe,Davide Testuggine,David Geraghty,David Mao,Vidhya Venkat,Ilya Mironov,Rithesh Baradi,Gayathri Aiyer,Victoria Dudin*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: LogAct：一种基于共享日志的智能体抽象，通过解构状态机实现动作可见性、可中断性和一致性恢复，支持智能体自省和语义级恢复、健康检查与优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在生产环境中部署LLM驱动的智能体面临挑战：异步性和故障使得执行保证难以提取。智能体能够以强大且任意的方式改变环境，但缺乏可靠的机制来监控、中断和恢复其动作。

Method: 提出LogAct抽象，将每个智能体解构为在共享日志上运行的状态机。关键设计：1）动作在执行前在共享日志中可见；2）可通过可插拔、解耦的投票器在动作执行前停止；3）在智能体或环境故障时实现一致性恢复。支持智能体自省，允许智能体使用LLM推理分析自身执行历史。

Result: 评估显示：1）LogAct智能体能高效、正确地从故障中恢复；2）能够调试自身性能；3）在群体中优化令牌使用；4）在代表性基准测试中，仅以3%良性效用下降为代价，成功阻止目标模型的所有不需要动作。

Conclusion: LogAct提供了一种有效的抽象，解决了生产环境中智能体执行的可靠性问题。通过共享日志、动作可见性、可中断性和一致性恢复机制，结合智能体自省能力，实现了语义级的恢复、健康检查和优化，为智能体系统的可靠部署提供了新范式。

Abstract: Agents are LLM-driven components that can mutate environments in powerful, arbitrary ways. Extracting guarantees for the execution of agents in production environments can be challenging due to asynchrony and failures. In this paper, we propose a new abstraction called LogAct, where each agent is a deconstructed state machine playing a shared log. In LogAct, agentic actions are visible in the shared log before they are executed; can be stopped prior to execution by pluggable, decoupled voters; and recovered consistently in the case of agent or environment failure. LogAct enables agentic introspection, allowing the agent to analyze its own execution history using LLM inference, which in turn enables semantic variants of recovery, health check, and optimization. In our evaluation, LogAct agents recover efficiently and correctly from failures; debug their own performance; optimize token usage in swarms; and stop all unwanted actions for a target model on a representative benchmark with just a 3% drop in benign utility.

</details>


### [271] [Blink: CPU-Free LLM Inference by Delegating the Serving Stack to GPU and SmartNIC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07609)
*Mohammad Siavashi,Mariano Scazzariello,Gerald Q. Maguire,Dejan Kostić,Marco Chiesa*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Blink是一种端到端的LLM服务架构，通过将主机CPU从稳态推理路径中移除，将职责重新分配到SmartNIC和GPU上，显著提升LLM推理性能并减少CPU干扰影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM服务架构将主机CPU置于关键路径上，导致性能对CPU干扰敏感，限制了应用共置和资源利用率。需要一种能消除CPU瓶颈的解决方案。

Method: Blink将请求处理卸载到SmartNIC，通过RDMA直接将输入传送到GPU内存，并用持久GPU内核替代主机驱动的调度，实现无CPU参与的批处理、调度和KV缓存管理。

Result: 相比TensorRT-LLM、vLLM和SGLang，Blink在隔离环境下将P99 TTFT降低8.47倍，P99 TPOT降低3.40倍，解码吞吐量提升2.1倍，每令牌能耗降低48.6%。在CPU干扰下保持稳定性能，而现有系统性能下降可达两个数量级。

Conclusion: Blink通过将CPU从关键路径中移除，实现了更高效、稳定且节能的LLM推理服务，为数据中心LLM服务提供了新的架构范式。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference is rapidly becoming a core datacenter service, yet current serving stacks keep the host CPU on the critical path for orchestration and token-level control. This makes LLM performance sensitive to CPU interference, undermining application colocation and forcing operators to reserve CPU headroom, leaving substantial capacity unutilized.
  We introduce Blink, an end-to-end serving architecture that removes the host CPU from the steady-state inference path by redistributing responsibilities across a SmartNIC and a GPU. Blink offloads request handling to the SmartNIC, which delivers inputs directly into GPU memory via RDMA, and replaces host-driven scheduling with a persistent GPU kernel that performs batching, scheduling, and KV-cache management without CPU involvement.
  Evaluated against TensorRT-LLM, vLLM, and SGLang, Blink outperforms all baselines even in isolation, reducing pre-saturation P99 TTFT by up to 8.47$\times$ and P99 TPOT by up to 3.40$\times$, improving decode throughput by up to 2.1$\times$, and reducing energy per token by up to 48.6$\%$. Under CPU interference, Blink maintains stable performance, while existing systems degrade by up to two orders of magnitude.

</details>


### [272] [NestPipe: Large-Scale Recommendation Training on 1,500+ Accelerators via Nested Pipelining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06956)
*Zhida Jiang,Zhaolong Xing,Huichao Chai,Tianxing Sun,Qiang Peng,Baopeng Yuan,Jiaxing Wang,Hua Du,Zhixin Wu,Xuemiao Li,Yikui Cao,Xinyu Liu,Yongxiang Feng,Zhen Chen,Ke Zhang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: NestPipe是一个大规模去中心化嵌入训练框架，通过嵌套流水线解决万亿参数推荐模型在千级集群中的查找和通信瓶颈，同时保持同步训练语义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代推荐模型参数已达万亿级别，当集群规模扩展到千级时，分布式训练瓶颈从计算和内存转移到数据移动，特别是嵌入的查找和通信延迟。现有解决方案要么只优化一个瓶颈，要么通过牺牲训练一致性来提高吞吐量。

Method: 提出NestPipe框架，利用两种分层稀疏并行机会：1) 批间级：通过双缓冲同步构建无陈旧五级流水线（DBP），缓解查找瓶颈；2) 批内级：基于嵌入冻结现象，通过协调流调度和以键为中心的样本聚类，实现Frozen-Window流水线（FWP），使All2All通信与密集计算重叠。

Result: 在生产GPU和NPU集群（1,536个worker）上的实验表明，NestPipe实现了最高3.06倍的加速和94.07%的扩展效率。

Conclusion: NestPipe通过嵌套流水线同时解决了大规模推荐模型训练中的查找和通信瓶颈，同时保持了同步训练语义，在千级集群上实现了显著的性能提升和高扩展效率。

Abstract: Modern recommendation models have increased to trillions of parameters. As cluster scales expand to O(1k), distributed training bottlenecks shift from computation and memory to data movement, especially lookup and communication latency associated with embeddings. Existing solutions either optimize only one bottleneck or improve throughput by sacrificing training consistency. This paper presents NestPipe, a large-scale decentralized embedding training framework that tackles both bottlenecks while preserving synchronous training semantics. NestPipe exploits two hierarchical sparse parallelism opportunities through nested pipelining. At the inter-batch level, Dual-Buffer Pipelining (DBP) constructs a staleness-free five-stage pipeline through dual-buffer synchronization, mitigating lookup bottlenecks without embedding staleness. At the intra-batch level, we identify the embedding freezing phenomenon, which inspires Frozen-Window Pipelining (FWP) to overlap All2All communication with dense computation via coordinated stream scheduling and key-centric sample clustering. Experiments on production GPU and NPU clusters with 1,536 workers demonstrate that NestPipe achieves up to 3.06x speedup and 94.07% scaling efficiency.

</details>


### [273] [CodecSight: Leveraging Video Codec Signals for Efficient Streaming VLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06036)
*Yulin Zou,Yan Chen,Wenyan Chen,JooYoung Park,Shivaraman Nitin,Luo Tao,Francisco Romero,Dmitrii Ustiugov*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: CodecSight：利用视频编解码器元数据指导视觉语言模型流式视频分析，通过编解码器引导的补丁剪枝和选择性KV缓存刷新，实现端到端优化，无需离线训练，显著提升吞吐量并降低GPU计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频流分析是视觉语言模型服务的关键工作负载，但多模态推理的高成本限制了可扩展性。现有系统通过利用视频流中的时空冗余来降低推理成本，但主要针对视觉Transformer或LLM的局部优化，未能挖掘端到端机会，且识别冗余的方法（离线分析/训练或昂贵的在线计算）开销大，不适合动态实时流。

Method: CodecSight将视频编解码器元数据作为低成本运行时信号，统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充。具体包括：1）编解码器引导的补丁剪枝（在ViT编码前）；2）选择性键值缓存刷新（在LLM预填充期间）。系统直接在压缩比特流上操作，减少传输开销，完全在线运行，无需离线训练。

Result: 实验显示，CodecSight相比最先进的基线方法，吞吐量提升最高达3倍，GPU计算减少最高达87%，同时保持竞争性精度，F1分数仅下降0~8%。

Conclusion: CodecSight通过利用视频编解码器已有的时空结构信息，实现了高效、低开销的流式视频分析系统，为视觉语言模型服务提供了可扩展的解决方案，特别适合动态实时视频流场景。

Abstract: Video streaming analytics is a crucial workload for vision-language model serving, but the high cost of multimodal inference limits scalability. Prior systems reduce inference cost by exploiting temporal and spatial redundancy in video streams, but they target either the vision transformer (ViT) or the LLM with a limited view, leaving end-to-end opportunities untapped. Moreover, existing methods incur significant overhead to identify redundancy, either through offline profiling and training or costly online computation, making them ill-suited for dynamic real-time streams.
  We present CodecSight, a codec-guided streaming video analytics system, built on a key observation that video codecs already extract the temporal and spatial structure of each stream as a byproduct of compression. CodecSight treats this codec metadata as a low-cost runtime signal to unify optimization across video decoding, visual processing, and LLM prefilling, with transmission reduction as an inherent benefit of operating directly on compressed bitstreams. This drives codec-guided patch pruning before ViT encoding and selective key-value cache refresh during LLM prefilling, both of which are fully online and do not require offline training. Experiments show that CodecSight achieves an improvement in throughput of up to 3$\times$, and a reduction of up to 87% in GPU compute over state-of-the-art baselines, maintaining competitive accuracy with only 0$\sim$8% F1 drop.

</details>


### [274] [Foundry: Template-Based CUDA Graph Context Materialization for Fast LLM Serving Cold Start](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06664)
*Xueshen Liu,Yongji Wu,Yuncheng Yao,Danyang Zhuo,Ion Stoica,Z. Morley Mao*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Foundry是一个基于模板的CUDA图上下文物化系统，通过离线处理阶段持久化图拓扑和执行上下文，在线重建可执行图时实现可忽略的开销，将大型模型冷启动延迟降低高达99%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM服务提供商依赖自动扩缩容和并行重构来应对快速变化的工作负载，但冷启动延迟仍是主要瓶颈。虽然已有系统将模型权重加载减少到秒级，但CUDA图捕获仍需数十秒到数分钟，且通常主导启动时间。CUDA图无法简单序列化，因为它们与执行上下文紧密耦合，包括嵌入内核参数的设备地址和预热期间惰性加载的内核代码。现有方法要么依赖脆弱的特定内核补丁，要么使用重量级的进程级检查点/恢复，无法灵活适应动态并行切换。

Method: Foundry采用模板化方法，在离线处理阶段持久化图拓扑和执行上下文，在线重建可执行图。系统强制确定性内存布局，自动提取和重新加载捕获图所需的内核二进制文件，并通过基于拓扑的模板化降低在线重建成本。对于分布式服务，Foundry进一步支持单GPU离线捕获生成多GPU部署模板，仅修补与rank相关的通信状态。

Result: 在参数高达235B的密集和MoE模型上，Foundry将冷启动延迟降低高达99%。具体而言，将Qwen3-235B-A22B的初始化时间从10分钟减少到3.9秒，同时保持了CUDA图的吞吐量优势。

Conclusion: Foundry通过模板化方法有效解决了CUDA图序列化的挑战，显著降低了LLM服务的冷启动延迟，同时保持了CUDA图的性能优势，为动态工作负载下的高效模型服务提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Modern LLM service providers increasingly rely on autoscaling and parallelism reconfiguration to respond to rapidly changing workloads, but cold-start latency remains a major bottleneck. While recent systems have reduced model weight loading to seconds, CUDA graph capture still takes tens of seconds to minutes and often dominates startup. Unfortunately, CUDA graphs cannot be naively serialized: beyond graph topology, they are tightly coupled to execution context, including device addresses embedded in kernel arguments and kernel code lazily loaded during warmup. Existing approaches either rely on brittle kernel-specific patching or heavyweight process-level checkpoint/restore that are inflexible to dynamic parallelism switching. We present Foundry, a template-based CUDA graph context materialization system that persists both graph topology and execution context during an offline processing stage, and reconstructs executable graphs online with negligible overhead. Foundry enforces deterministic memory layouts, automatically extracts and reloads kernel binaries required by captured graphs, and reduces online reconstruction costs through topology-based templating. For distributed serving, Foundry further enables a single-GPU offline capture to generate templates for multi-GPU deployments by patching only rank-dependent communication state. Across dense and MoE models up to 235B parameters, Foundry reduces cold-start latency by up to 99%, cutting the initialization time of Qwen3-235B-A22B from 10 minutes to 3.9 seconds while preserving the throughput gains of CUDA graphs.

</details>


### [275] [DynLP: Parallel Dynamic Batch Update for Label Propagation in Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06596)
*S M Shovan,Arindam Khanda,S M Ferdous,Sajal K. Das,Mahantesh Halappanavar*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: DynLP：一种基于GPU的动态批量并行标签传播算法，用于增量图数据上的半监督学习，避免全图重新计算，实现最高102倍加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中数据通常以增量批次到达，传统标签传播算法需要重新计算所有标签，这种全图重计算是冗余的、计算密集且低效的，缺乏高效的标签传播更新方法

Method: 提出DynLP算法，这是一种GPU中心的动态批量并行标签传播算法，仅执行必要的更新，将变化传播到相关子图而不需要完全重新计算，并利用GPU架构优化

Result: 在大规模数据集上，相比最先进方法，平均实现13倍加速，最高达到102倍加速

Conclusion: DynLP算法有效解决了增量图数据上标签传播的低效问题，通过GPU优化和局部更新策略显著提升了计算效率

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning aims to infer class labels using only a small fraction of labeled data. In graph-based semi-supervised learning, this is typically achieved through label propagation to predict labels of unlabeled nodes. However, in real-world applications, data often arrive incrementally in batches. Each time a new batch appears, reapplying the traditional label propagation algorithm to recompute all labels is redundant, computationally intensive, and inefficient. To address the absence of an efficient label propagation update method, we propose DynLP, a novel GPU-centric Dynamic Batched Parallel Label Propagation algorithm that performs only the necessary updates, propagating changes to the relevant subgraph without requiring full recalculation. By exploiting GPU architectural optimizations, our algorithm achieves on average 13x and upto 102x speedup on large-scale datasets compared to state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.stat-mech'></div>

# cond-mat.stat-mech [[Back]](#toc)

### [276] [Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07762)
*Haiqian Yang,Vishaal Krishnan,Sumit Sinha,L. Mahadevan*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于时间反转对偶性的最优控制框架，通过前向松弛轨迹计算反向最优传输，避免了直接模拟困难的反向动力学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决从无序参考态到结构化目标系综的最优控制问题，其中目标系综仅通过样本经验描述，而反向最优传输需要已知目标系综的轨迹信息，形成循环依赖。

Method: 建立时间反转对偶性：反向动力学的值函数满足等价的前向HJB方程，通过Cole-Hopf变换和Feynman-Kac表示，将前向势函数计算为路径空间自由能，仅需前向松弛轨迹模拟。

Result: 开发了无需反向模拟或目标系综完整知识的计算框架，通过数值示例展示了学习到的值函数和诱导的受控扩散过程，揭示了空间成本场如何类似非均匀介质中的费马原理塑造传输几何。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学之间的统一联系，提供了基于路径空间自由能、风险敏感控制和空间成本几何的物理可解释描述。

Abstract: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schrödinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.

</details>


### [277] [Score Shocks: The Burgers Equation Structure of Diffusion Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07404)
*Krisanu Sarkar*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 该论文通过Burgers型演化定律分析扩散生成模型的得分场，揭示了得分场在VE扩散中遵循粘性Burgers方程，并提出了基于二元分解的物种形成判据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究扩散生成模型中得分场的演化规律，特别是物种形成转变（speciation transitions）的数学机制，为理解扩散模型中的模式分离现象提供PDE视角。

Method: 采用Burgers型演化定律分析VE扩散的得分场，将噪声密度进行二元分解，推导出得分场分离为平滑背景和tanh界面项，建立物种形成的正则判据，并通过变量变换将VP-SDE简化为VE情况。

Result: 证明了VE扩散中得分场遵循粘性Burgers方程，提出了基于二元分解的物种形成判据，在对称高斯混合模型中恢复了临界扩散时间，量化了得分误差在界面层的指数放大，并给出了VP物种形成时间的闭式解。

Conclusion: 扩散生成模型的得分场演化可以用Burgers方程描述，物种形成转变对应于模式间界面的锐化，二元分解方法提供了分析物种形成的统一框架，理论结果在对称高斯混合模型中得到了精确验证。

Abstract: We analyze the score field of a diffusion generative model through a Burgers-type evolution law. For VE diffusion, the heat-evolved data density implies that the score obeys viscous Burgers in one dimension and the corresponding irrotational vector Burgers system in $\R^d$, giving a PDE view of \emph{speciation transitions} as the sharpening of inter-mode interfaces. For any binary decomposition of the noised density into two positive heat solutions, the score separates into a smooth background and a universal $\tanh$ interfacial term determined by the component log-ratio; near a regular binary mode boundary this yields a normal criterion for speciation. In symmetric binary Gaussian mixtures, the criterion recovers the critical diffusion time detected by the midpoint derivative of the score and agrees with the spectral criterion of Biroli, Bonnaire, de~Bortoli, and Mézard (2024). After subtracting the background drift, the inter-mode layer has a local Burgers $\tanh$ profile, which becomes global in the symmetric Gaussian case with width $σ_τ^2/a$. We also quantify exponential amplification of score errors across this layer, show that Burgers dynamics preserves irrotationality, and use a change of variables to reduce the VP-SDE to the VE case, yielding a closed-form VP speciation time. Gaussian-mixture formulas are verified to machine precision, and the local theorem is checked numerically on a quartic double-well.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [278] [HistDiT: A Structure-Aware Latent Conditional Diffusion Model for High-Fidelity Virtual Staining in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08305)
*Aasim Bin Saleem,Amr Ahmed,Ardhendu Behera,Hafeezullah Amin,Iman Yi Liao,Mahmoud Khattab,Pan Jia Wern,Haslina Makmur*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: HistDiT：一种用于虚拟组织化学染色的新型潜在条件扩散Transformer架构，通过双流条件策略和多目标损失函数，在保持细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达，解决了现有方法在结构和染色之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统免疫组化染色方法资源密集、耗时且易造成结构损伤，而现有的虚拟染色方法在保持精细细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达方面存在挑战，常常面临"结构和染色权衡"的问题，生成的样本要么结构相关但模糊，要么纹理真实但存在影响诊断使用的伪影。

Method: 提出HistDiT，一种新型潜在条件扩散Transformer架构，采用：1）双流条件策略，通过VAE编码的潜在空间保持空间约束平衡，通过UNI嵌入提供语义表型指导；2）多目标损失函数，有助于生成具有清晰形态结构的更锐利图像；3）使用结构相关性度量专注于核心形态结构，精确评估样本质量。

Result: 该模型在严格的定量和定性评估中优于现有基线方法，为虚拟组织学染色建立了新的视觉保真度基准。

Conclusion: HistDiT通过创新的双流条件策略、多目标损失函数和结构相关性度量，成功解决了虚拟染色中结构和染色之间的权衡问题，为乳腺癌HER2等免疫生物标志物的评估提供了更准确、可扩展的替代方案。

Abstract: Immunohistochemistry (IHC) is essential for assessing specific immune biomarkers like Human Epidermal growth-factor Receptor 2 (HER2) in breast cancer. However, the traditional protocols of obtaining IHC stains are resource-intensive, time-consuming, and prone to structural damages. Virtual staining has emerged as a scalable alternative, but it faces significant challenges in preserving fine-grained cellular structures while accurately translating biochemical expressions. Current state-of-the-art methods still rely on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or standard convolutional U-Net diffusion models that often struggle with "structure and staining trade-offs". The generated samples are either structurally relevant but blurry, or texturally realistic but have artifacts that compromise their diagnostic use. In this paper, we introduce HistDiT, a novel latent conditional Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that establishes a new benchmark for visual fidelity in virtual histological staining. The novelty introduced in this work is, a) the Dual-Stream Conditioning strategy that explicitly maintains a balance between spatial constraints via VAE-encoded latents and semantic phenotype guidance via UNI embeddings; b) the multi-objective loss function that contributes to sharper images with clear morphological structure; and c) the use of the Structural Correlation Metric (SCM) to focus on the core morphological structure for precise assessment of sample quality. Consequently, our model outperforms existing baselines, as demonstrated through rigorous quantitative and qualitative evaluations.

</details>


### [279] [A Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) Framework for High Fidelity Image Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06568)
*Zhenyu Du,Yanbo Gao,Shuai Li,Yiyang Li,Hui Yuan,Mao Ye*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出NC-Diffusion框架，通过将量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声，解决扩散模型图像压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，提高重建保真度和推理效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像压缩方法在扩散学习中引入随机噪声，导致重建图像与原始图像存在偏差，压缩效果不理想。需要解决噪声不匹配问题以提高压缩性能

Method: 1) 提出NC-Diffusion框架，将学习图像压缩中的量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声；2) 构建从真实图像到带量化噪声的初始压缩结果的噪声约束扩散过程；3) 开发自适应频域滤波模块增强U-Net架构中的跳跃连接；4) 设计零样本样本引导增强方法进一步提高图像保真度

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法取得了最佳性能，显著提高了推理效率

Conclusion: NC-Diffusion框架通过解决扩散模型图像压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，实现了高保真图像压缩，结合自适应频域滤波和零样本增强，在多个数据集上取得了最优性能

Abstract: With the great success of diffusion models in image generation, diffusion-based image compression is attracting increasing interests. However, due to the random noise introduced in the diffusion learning, they usually produce reconstructions with deviation from the original images, leading to suboptimal compression results. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) framework for high fidelity image compression. Unlike existing diffusion-based compression methods that add random Gaussian noise and direct the noise into the image space, the proposed NC-Diffusion formulates the quantization noise originally added in the learned image compression as the noise in the forward process of diffusion. Then a noise constrained diffusion process is constructed from the ground-truth image to the initial compression result generated with quantization noise. The NC-Diffusion overcomes the problem of noise mismatch between compression and diffusion, significantly improving the inference efficiency. In addition, an adaptive frequency-domain filtering module is developed to enhance the skip connections in the U-Net based diffusion architecture, in order to enhance high-frequency details. Moreover, a zero-shot sample-guided enhancement method is designed to further improve the fidelity of the image. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the best performance compared with existing methods.

</details>


### [280] [Adaptive Differential Privacy for Federated Medical Image Segmentation Across Diverse Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06518)
*Puja Saha,Eranga Ukwatta*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，用于医学图像分割，通过动态调整隐私机制在隐私保护与模型性能之间取得更好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学数据因隐私法规和机构限制难以集中化利用，且集中训练模型难以泛化到不同临床站点。联邦学习虽能实现协作训练而不共享原始数据，但加入差分隐私保护会导致精度下降、收敛不稳定和泛化能力降低。

Method: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，动态调整隐私机制以优化隐私-效用权衡。该框架稳定训练过程，显著提升Dice分数和分割边界质量，同时保持严格的隐私保证。

Result: 在多种成像模态和分割任务上评估ADP-FL，包括皮肤病变分割、肾脏肿瘤分割和脑肿瘤分割。相比传统联邦学习和标准差分隐私联邦学习，ADP-FL在相同隐私预算下获得更高精度、更好边界描绘、更快收敛和更强训练稳定性，性能接近非隐私联邦学习。

Conclusion: ADP-FL为现实世界联邦环境中的高性能、隐私保护医学图像分割提供了实用可行的解决方案，在严格隐私保证下实现了接近非隐私联邦学习的性能。

Abstract: Large volumes of medical data remain underutilized because centralizing distributed data is often infeasible due to strict privacy regulations and institutional constraints. In addition, models trained in centralized settings frequently fail to generalize across clinical sites because of heterogeneity in imaging protocols and continuously evolving data distributions arising from differences in scanners, acquisition parameters, and patient populations. Federated learning offers a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training without sharing raw data. However, incorporating differential privacy into federated learning, while essential for privacy guarantees, often leads to degraded accuracy, unstable convergence, and reduced generalization. In this work, we propose an adaptive differentially private federated learning (ADP-FL) framework for medical image segmentation that dynamically adjusts privacy mechanisms to better balance the privacy-utility trade-off. The proposed approach stabilizes training, significantly improves Dice scores and segmentation boundary quality, and maintains rigorous privacy guarantees. We evaluated ADP-FL across diverse imaging modalities and segmentation tasks, including skin lesion segmentation in dermoscopic images, kidney tumor segmentation in 3D CT scans, and brain tumor segmentation in multi-parametric MRI. Compared with conventional federated learning and standard differentially private federated learning, ADP-FL consistently achieves higher accuracy, improved boundary delineation, faster convergence, and greater training stability, with performance approaching that of non-private federated learning under the same privacy budgets. These results demonstrate the practical viability of ADP-FL for high-performance, privacy-preserving medical image segmentation in real-world federated settings.

</details>


### [281] [Accelerating 4D Hyperspectral Imaging through Physics-Informed Neural Representation and Adaptive Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06561)
*Chi-Jui Ho,Harsh Bhakta,Wei Xiong,Nicholas Antipa*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一种物理信息神经表示方法，从稀疏实验测量中高效重建密集空间分辨的2DIR高光谱图像，将实验时间减少32倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维高光谱成像能够可视化超快分子动力学和复杂异质光谱，但将其应用于解析二维红外光谱中的空间变化振动耦合需要过长的数据采集时间，这源于密集的奈奎斯特采样要求和大量信号累积需求

Method: 引入物理信息神经表示方法，使用多层感知器建模子采样4D坐标与对应光谱强度之间的关系，从有限观测中恢复密集采样的4D光谱；开发损失感知自适应采样方法，在实验过程中逐步引入潜在信息样本进行迭代数据收集

Result: 该方法仅使用1/32的采样预算即可实现高保真光谱恢复，有效将总实验时间减少高达32倍；重建结果证明该方法能够忠实地恢复实验测量中的振荡和非振荡光谱动力学

Conclusion: 该框架为加速任何超立方体数据实验提供了可扩展解决方案，包括多维光谱和高光谱成像，为快速化学成像瞬态生物和材料系统铺平了道路

Abstract: High-dimensional hyperspectral imaging (HSI) enables the visualization of ultrafast molecular dynamics and complex, heterogeneous spectra. However, applying this capability to resolve spatially varying vibrational couplings in two-dimensional infrared (2DIR) spectroscopy, a type of coherent multidimensional spectroscopy (CMDS), necessitates prohibitively long data acquisition, driven by dense Nyquist sampling requirements and the need for extensive signal accumulation. To address this challenge, we introduce a physics-informed neural representation approach that efficiently reconstructs dense spatially-resolved 2DIR hyperspectral images from sparse experimental measurements. In particular, we used a multilayer perceptron (MLP) to model the relationship between the sub-sampled 4D coordinates and their corresponding spectral intensities, and recover densely sampled 4D spectra from limited observations. The reconstruction results demonstrate that our method, using a fraction of the samples, faithfully recovers both oscillatory and non-oscillatory spectral dynamics in experimental measurement. Moreover, we develop a loss-aware adaptive sampling method to progressively introduce potentially informative samples for iterative data collection while conducting experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves high-fidelity spectral recovery using only $1/32$ of the sampling budget, as opposed to exhaustive sampling, effectively reducing total experiment time by up to 32-fold. This framework offers a scalable solution for accelerating any experiments with hypercube data, including multidimensional spectroscopy and hyperspectral imaging, paving the way for rapid chemical imaging of transient biological and material systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.MS'></div>

# cs.MS [[Back]](#toc)

### [282] [$k$-server-bench: Automating Potential Discovery for the $k$-Server Conjecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07240)
*Kirill Brilliantov,Etienne Bamas,Emmanuel Abbé*

Main category: cs.MS

TL;DR: 提出基于k-server猜想的代码挑战，通过发现满足线性不等式系统的势函数来推动数学发现，作为自动化数学发现的基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自动化、开放式数学发现创建代码基准，基于k-server猜想这一竞争分析中的核心开放问题。该任务旨在测试智能体发现满足复杂约束的势函数的能力，同时为k-server社区提供验证新假设的工具。

Method: 设计基于k-server猜想的代码挑战任务：发现满足大规模图结构线性不等式系统的势函数。评估过程是可靠但不完备的——违反任何不等式即可反驳候选解，但满足所有不等式本身不构成证明。在已解决的k=3情况下验证方法可行性，在开放的k=4情况下测试现有势函数的改进。

Result: 在已解决的k=3情况下，当前智能体方法能够解决非平凡实例；在开放的k=4情况下，这些方法减少了现有势函数的违反数量，但未能完全解决任务。该任务缓解了现有开放式代码基准的局限性，包括早期饱和和朴素随机基线与方法间的弱分离问题。

Conclusion: 该任务具有挑战性但可能在当前方法能力范围内，既可作为k-server社区的研究工具，也可作为开发代码发现智能体的有用基准。成功的候选解将是k-server猜想的重要贡献，结合完整证明可能成为实质性理论成果。

Abstract: We introduce a code-based challenge for automated, open-ended mathematical discovery based on the $k$-server conjecture, a central open problem in competitive analysis. The task is to discover a potential function satisfying a large graph-structured system of simple linear inequalities. The resulting evaluation procedure is sound but incomplete: any violated inequality definitively refutes a candidate, whereas satisfying all inequalities does not by itself constitute a proof of the corresponding conjecture's special case. Nevertheless, a candidate that passes all constraints would be strong evidence toward a valid proof and, to the best of our knowledge, no currently known potential achieves this under our formulation in the open $k=4$ circle case. As such, a successful candidate would already be an interesting contribution to the $k$-server conjecture, and could become a substantial theoretical result when paired with a full proof.
  Experiments on the resolved $k=3$ regime show that current agentic methods can solve nontrivial instances, and in the open $k=4$ regime they reduce the number of violations relative to existing potentials without fully resolving the task. Taken together, these results suggest that the task is challenging but plausibly within reach of current methods.
  Beyond its relevance to the $k$-server community, where the developed tooling enables researchers to test new hypotheses and potentially improve on the current record, the task also serves as a useful \emph{benchmark} for developing code-based discovery agents. In particular, our $k=3$ results show that it mitigates important limitations of existing open-ended code-based benchmarks, including early saturation and the weak separation between naive random baselines and more sophisticated methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [283] [PSI: Shared State as the Missing Layer for Coherent AI-Generated Instruments in Personal AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08529)
*Zhiyuan Wang,Erzhen Hu,Mark Rucker,Laura E. Barnes*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: PSI是一个共享状态架构，将独立生成的AI模块转化为连贯的"乐器"（持久、连接、聊天互补的工件），通过共享个人上下文总线实现跨模块推理和同步操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前个人AI工具可以从自然语言请求生成，但生成后往往保持孤立状态。需要一种架构将这些独立生成的模块整合成连贯的个人计算环境。

Method: 提出PSI架构，通过共享个人上下文总线实现模块间的状态发布和写回机制。模块将当前状态和写回功能发布到总线，支持跨模块推理和跨接口同步操作。通过三周的自传式部署在自研个人AI环境中进行验证。

Result: 研究表明，后期生成的"乐器"可以通过相同合约自动集成。PSI成功将AI生成的个人软件从孤立应用转变为连贯的个人计算环境。

Conclusion: 共享状态是缺失的系统层，能够将AI生成的个人软件从孤立应用转化为连贯的个人计算环境。PSI架构通过共享状态机制实现了这一转变。

Abstract: Personal AI tools can now be generated from natural-language requests, but they often remain isolated after creation. We present PSI, a shared-state architecture that turns independently generated modules into coherent instruments: persistent, connected, and chat-complementary artifacts accessible through both GUIs and a generic chat agent. By publishing current state and write-back affordances to a shared personal-context bus, modules enable cross-module reasoning and synchronized actions across interfaces. We study PSI through a three-week autobiographical deployment in a self-developed personal AI environment and show that later-generated instruments can be integrated automatically through the same contract. PSI identifies shared state as the missing systems layer that transforms AI-generated personal software from isolated apps into coherent personal computing environments.

</details>


### [284] [From Gaze to Guidance: Interpreting and Adapting to Users' Cognitive Needs with Multimodal Gaze-Aware AI Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08062)
*Valdemar Danry,Javier Hernandez,Andrew Wilson,Pattie Maes,Judith Amores*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 基于视线追踪的多模态LLM助手，通过眼动数据识别用户阅读困难点，提供针对性帮助，相比纯文本LLM在准确性和信息回忆方面表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM助手在回答问题时能力强大，但缺乏对用户行为上下文（特别是何时何地遇到困难）的访问能力。需要利用眼动数据来识别用户的认知困难点，提供更有针对性的帮助。

Method: 开发了基于视线追踪的多模态LLM助手，使用带有眼动覆盖的自我中心视频来识别可能的困难点，并针对性地提供回顾性帮助。通过对照研究（n=36）比较视线感知AI助手与纯文本LLM助手的效果。

Result: 相比传统LLM助手，视线感知助手在评估用户阅读行为方面被评定为显著更准确和个性化，显著提高了用户的信息回忆能力。用户与视线感知助手交流时使用的词语显著减少，表明交互效率更高。定性结果强调了在理解方面的感知益处，以及眼动行为解释不准确时的挑战。

Conclusion: 视线感知的LLM助手能够推理用户的认知需求，从而改善用户的认知结果。眼动数据为LLM提供了有价值的用户行为上下文，有助于创建更有效、个性化的学习辅助系统。

Abstract: Current LLM assistants are powerful at answering questions, but they have limited access to the behavioral context that reveals when and where a user is struggling. We present a gaze-grounded multimodal LLM assistant that uses egocentric video with gaze overlays to identify likely points of difficulty and target follow-up retrospective assistance. We instantiate this vision in a controlled study (n=36) comparing the gaze-aware AI assistant to a text-only LLM assistant. Compared to a conventional LLM assistant, the gaze-aware assistant was rated as significantly more accurate and personalized in its assessments of users' reading behavior and significantly improved people's ability to recall information. Users spoke significantly fewer words with the gaze-aware assistant, indicating more efficient interactions. Qualitative results underscored both perceived benefits in comprehension and challenges when interpretations of gaze behaviors were inaccurate. Our findings suggest that gaze-aware LLM assistants can reason about cognitive needs to improve cognitive outcomes of users.

</details>


### [285] [BATON: A Multimodal Benchmark for Bidirectional Automation Transition Observation in Naturalistic Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07263)
*Yuhang Wang,Yiyao Xu,Chaoyun Yang,Lingyao Li,Jingran Sun,Hao Zhou*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: BATON数据集填补了自动驾驶控制转移预测的数据空白，包含多模态同步数据，基准测试显示视觉输入不足，需结合车辆信号和路线上下文才能可靠预测控制转移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有驾驶自动化系统要求驾驶员持续保持注意力并随时准备接管，这带来了巨大的认知负荷、陡峭的学习曲线和安全风险。预测驾驶员何时将控制权交给自动驾驶系统以及何时接管控制对于设计主动的、上下文感知的人机交互界面至关重要，但现有数据集很少捕捉多模态上下文信息。

Method: 引入BATON大规模自然主义数据集，包含127名驾驶员和136.6小时的真实驾驶数据。数据集同步记录了前视视频、车内视频、解码的CAN总线信号、基于雷达的前车交互数据以及GPS衍生的路线上下文，形成了围绕每个控制转移的闭环多模态记录。

Result: 定义了三个基准任务：驾驶行为理解、控制权移交预测和接管预测。评估了序列模型、经典分类器和零样本视觉语言模型等基线方法。结果显示，仅视觉输入不足以可靠预测控制转移：前视视频捕捉道路上下文但无法反映驾驶员状态，而车内视频反映驾驶员准备状态但无法捕捉外部场景。结合CAN和路线上下文信号显著提高了性能，表明各模态之间存在强互补性。

Conclusion: 接管事件发展更为渐进，受益于更长的预测时间范围，而控制权移交事件更依赖于即时上下文线索，这种不对称性对辅助驾驶系统的人机交互设计具有直接意义。多模态数据对于准确预测控制转移至关重要。

Abstract: Existing driving automation (DA) systems on production vehicles rely on human drivers to decide when to engage DA while requiring them to remain continuously attentive and ready to intervene. This design demands substantial situational judgment and imposes significant cognitive load, leading to steep learning curves, suboptimal user experience, and safety risks from both over-reliance and delayed takeover. Predicting when drivers hand over control to DA and when they take it back is therefore critical for designing proactive, context-aware HMI, yet existing datasets rarely capture the multimodal context, including road scene, driver state, vehicle dynamics, and route environment. To fill this gap, we introduce BATON, a large-scale naturalistic dataset capturing real-world DA usage across 127 drivers, and 136.6 hours of driving. The dataset synchronizes front-view video, in-cabin video, decoded CAN bus signals, radar-based lead-vehicle interaction, and GPS-derived route context, forming a closed-loop multimodal record around each control transition. We define three benchmark tasks: driving action understanding, handover prediction, and takeover prediction, and evaluate baselines spanning sequence models, classical classifiers, and zero-shot VLMs. Results show that visual input alone is insufficient for reliable transition prediction: front-view video captures road context but not driver state, while in-cabin video reflects driver readiness but not the external scene. Incorporating CAN and route-context signals substantially improves performance over video-only settings, indicating strong complementarity across modalities. We further find takeover events develop more gradually and benefit from longer prediction horizons, whereas handover events depend more on immediate contextual cues, revealing an asymmetry with direct implications for HMI design in assisted driving systems.

</details>


### [286] [Generative Experiences for Digital Mental Health Interventions: Evidence from a Randomized Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07558)
*Ananya Bhattacharjee,Michael Liut,Matthew Jörke,Diyi Yang,Emma Brunskill*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: GUIDE系统通过运行时生成个性化干预内容和多模态交互结构，显著降低用户压力并改善体验


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数字心理健康工具主要关注提供什么支持内容，但忽略了如何让用户体验这些支持。即使内容匹配，如果交互形式与用户参与方式不匹配，干预也可能失败

Method: 提出生成式体验范式，开发GUIDE系统，通过基于规则的模块化组件生成个性化干预内容和多模态交互结构

Result: 在237名参与者的预注册研究中，GUIDE显著降低压力水平(p=0.02)并改善用户体验(p=0.04)，相比基于LLM的认知重构对照组；支持多样化的反思和行动形式

Conclusion: 生成式体验范式为数字环境中动态塑造支持体验和执行方式奠定了基础，揭示了交互序列个性化中的张力

Abstract: Digital mental health (DMH) tools have extensively explored personalization of interventions to users' needs and contexts. However, this personalization often targets what support is provided, not how it is experienced. Even well-matched content can fail when the interaction format misaligns with how someone can engage. We introduce generative experience as a paradigm for DMH support, where the intervention experience is composed at runtime. We instantiate this in GUIDE, a system that generates personalized intervention content and multimodal interaction structure through rubric-guided generation of modular components. In a preregistered study with N = 237 participants, GUIDE significantly reduced stress (p = .02) and improved the user experience (p = .04) compared to an LLM-based cognitive restructuring control. GUIDE also supported diverse forms of reflection and action through varied interaction flows, while revealing tensions around personalization across the interaction sequence. This work lays the foundation for interventions that dynamically shape how support is experienced and enacted in digital settings.

</details>


### [287] [Mixed-Initiative Context: Structuring and Managing Context for Human-AI Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07121)
*Haichang Li,Qinshi Zhang,Piaohong Wang,Zhicong Lu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将多轮交互形成的上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的对象，实现动态组织管理，并通过Contextify系统验证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机协作中，多轮交互形成的上下文通常被扁平化为时间序列并作为固定整体处理，缺乏沿工作流程的动态组织管理机制。这些上下文在生命周期、结构层次和相关性上差异显著，临时或废弃的交流、并行话题线程会干扰协作，而用户只能通过间接方式影响上下文，缺乏明确可控性。

Method: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的交互对象。实现Contextify探测系统，通过用户研究考察用户的上下文管理行为、对AI主动性的态度以及整体协作体验。

Result: 通过用户研究验证了Mixed-Initiative Context概念的有效性，展示了用户如何管理上下文、对AI主动性的态度变化以及协作体验的改善。

Conclusion: Mixed-Initiative Context为人机协作中的上下文管理提供了新范式，使上下文成为可动态组织和调整的交互对象，为人机交互社区提供了重要启示。

Abstract: In the human-AI collaboration area, the context formed naturally through multi-turn interactions is typically flattened into a chronological sequence and treated as a fixed whole in subsequent reasoning, with no mechanism for dynamic organization and management along the collaboration workflow. Yet these contexts differ substantially in lifecycle, structural hierarchy, and relevance. For instance, temporary or abandoned exchanges and parallel topic threads persist in the limited context window, causing interference and even conflict. Meanwhile, users are largely limited to influencing context indirectly through input modifications (e.g., corrections, references, or ignoring), leaving their control neither explicit nor verifiable.
  To address this, we propose Mixed-Initiative Context, which reconceptualizes the context formed across multi-turn interactions as an explicit, structured, and manipulable interactive object. Under this concept, the structure, scope, and content of context can be dynamically organized and adjusted according to task needs, enabling both humans and AI to actively participate in context construction and regulation. To explore this concept, we implement Contextify as a probe system and conduct a user study examining users' context management behaviors, attitudes toward AI initiative, and overall collaboration experience. We conclude by discussing the implications of this concept for the HCI community.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [288] [What a Comfortable World: Ergonomic Principles Guided Apartment Layout Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08411)
*Piotr Nieciecki,Aleksander Plocharski,Przemyslaw Musialski*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种集成建筑设计原则的Transformer生成方法，通过可微损失函数优化房间邻接与接近度，显著提升布局的宜居性指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动的平面图生成方法往往复制了现实训练数据中的工效学低效问题，需要将建筑设计原则直接集成到生成过程中

Method: 基于文献中确立的建筑标准，制定可微损失函数来优化房间邻接和接近度，在训练过程中用这些工效学先验指导Transformer模型

Result: 该方法生成的布局在宜居性指标上显著改善，比较评估显示在保持高结构有效性的同时，在工效学合规性方面优于基线方法

Conclusion: 通过将建筑标准集成到生成过程中，能够产生更符合工效学原则的平面图布局，解决了现有数据驱动方法复制训练数据低效性的问题

Abstract: Current data-driven floor plan generation methods often reproduce the ergonomic inefficiencies found in real-world training datasets. To address this, we propose a novel approach that integrates architectural design principles directly into a transformer-based generative process. We formulate differentiable loss functions based on established architectural standards from literature to optimize room adjacency and proximity. By guiding the model with these ergonomic priors during training, our method produces layouts with significantly improved livability metrics. Comparative evaluations show that our approach outperforms baselines in ergonomic compliance while maintaining high structural validity.

</details>


### [289] [Splats under Pressure: Exploring Performance-Energy Trade-offs in Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting under Constrained GPU Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07177)
*Muhammad Fahim Tajwar,Arthur Wuhrlin,Bhojan Anand*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 该研究通过GPU降频和功耗限制模拟不同性能等级的GPU，评估3D高斯泼溅在边缘设备上的实时渲染可行性，分析性能-功耗关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索3D高斯泼溅在边缘客户端实时渲染的可行性，特别是在不同高斯泼溅数量和GPU计算预算下的性能表现，评估其在能源受限环境中的部署潜力。

Method: 采用基于仿真的方法，在单个高端GPU上通过系统性地降低GPU核心频率和应用功耗限制，模拟不同GPU性能等级。在不同性能点上测量帧率、运行时行为和功耗，分析FPS-功耗曲线、每帧能耗和性能每瓦等关系。

Result: 该方法能够近似从嵌入式、移动级设备到高端消费级系统的各类GPU性能边界，为边缘部署的3DGS系统提供性能-能耗权衡的早期见解。

Conclusion: 研究探索了客户端3DGS渲染的实际性能下限，评估了其在独立头显和瘦客户端等能源受限环境中的部署潜力，为边缘部署的3DGS系统可行性提供了重要参考。

Abstract: We investigate the feasibility of real-time 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rasterisation on edge clients with varying Gaussian splat counts and GPU computational budgets. Instead of evaluating multiple physical devices, we adopt an emulation-based approach that approximates different GPU capability tiers on a single high-end GPU. By systematically under-clocking the GPU core frequency and applying power caps, we emulate a controlled range of floating-point performance levels that approximate different GPU capability tiers. At each point in this range, we measure frame rate, runtime behaviour, and power consumption across scenes of varying complexity, pipelines, and optimisations, enabling analysis of power-performance relationships such as FPS-power curves, energy per frame, and performance per watt. This method allows us to approximate the performance envelope of a diverse class of GPUs, from embedded and mobile-class devices to high-end consumer-grade systems.
  Our objective is to explore the practical lower bounds of client-side 3DGS rasterisation and assess its potential for deployment in energy-constrained environments, including standalone headsets and thin clients. Through this analysis, we provide early insights into the performance-energy trade-offs that govern the viability of edge-deployed 3DGS systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [290] [CIAO - Code In Architecture Out - Automated Software Architecture Documentation with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08293)
*Marco De Luca,Tiziano Santilli,Domenico Amalfitano,Anna Rita Fasolino,Patrizio Pelliccione*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CIAO是一个基于LLM的自动化流程，能够从GitHub仓库直接生成符合标准模板的系统级架构文档，开发者评估认为其有价值且准确，但存在图表质量和高层上下文建模的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件架构文档对系统理解至关重要，但往往不可用或不完整。现有的基于LLM的技术通常只能处理局部构件，无法生成连贯的系统级架构描述，因此需要一种能够自动生成系统级架构文档的方法。

Method: 提出了CIAO（Code In Architecture Out）流程，这是一个基于LLM的工作流，以GitHub仓库为输入，按照从ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010、SEI Views & Beyond和C4模型派生的模板生成系统级架构文档。生成的文档可直接添加到目标仓库中。

Result: 通过22名开发者的评估研究，结果显示开发者普遍认为生成的文档有价值、易于理解且与源代码基本准确对应。同时发现图表质量、高层上下文建模和部署视图方面存在局限性。操作成本评估表明，生成完整架构文档仅需几分钟且成本低廉。

Conclusion: 结构化、面向标准的方法能够有效指导LLM生成既可用又经济高效的系统级架构文档，为自动化架构文档生成提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Software architecture documentation is essential for system comprehension, yet it is often unavailable or incomplete. While recent LLM-based techniques can generate documentation from code, they typically address local artifacts rather than producing coherent, system-level architectural descriptions. This paper presents a structured process for automatically generating system-level architectural documentation directly from GitHub repositories using Large Language Models. The process, called CIAO (Code In Architecture Out), defines an LLM-based workflow that takes a repository as input and produces system-level architectural documentation following a template derived from ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010, SEI Views \& Beyond, and the C4 model. The resulting documentation can be directly added to the target repository. We evaluated the process through a study with 22 developers, each reviewing the documentation generated for a repository they had contributed to. The evaluation shows that developers generally perceive the produced documentation as valuable, comprehensible, and broadly accurate with respect to the source code, while also highlighting limitations in diagram quality, high-level context modeling, and deployment views. We also assessed the operational cost of the process, finding that generating a complete architectural document requires only a few minutes and is inexpensive to run. Overall, the results indicate that a structured, standards-oriented approach can effectively guide LLMs in producing system-level architectural documentation that is both usable and cost-effective.

</details>


### [291] [Towards Counterfactual Explanation and Assertion Inference for CPS Debugging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07679)
*Zaid Ghazal,Hadiza Yusuf,Khouloud Gaaloul*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DeCaF是一个用于CPS调试的反事实引导解释和断言表征框架，通过生成最小化输入信号修改来将失败测试转为通过，并推断可解释的断言条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前CPS大规模仿真中发现的故障难以解释，特别是由连续和离散行为在特定事件或时间交互触发时。现有调试技术只能定位异常到特定模型组件，但无法提供触发违规的输入信号值、时序条件，或能够防止失败的最小精确时间修改。

Method: DeCaF框架包含三个核心步骤：1) 给定失败测试输入，生成将测试从失败转为通过的反事实输入信号修改；2) 设计最小、必要且充分的修改以精确恢复正确性；3) 推断输入上的逻辑谓词作为断言，以可解释形式概括恢复条件。方法结合了三种反事实生成器和两种因果模型，并推断成功断言。

Result: 在三个CPS案例研究中，DeCaF的最佳成功率通过KD-Tree最近邻结合M5模型树实现，而遗传算法结合随机森林在成功率和因果精确性之间提供了最强的平衡。

Conclusion: DeCaF为CPS调试提供了一个有效的反事实引导解释框架，能够生成最小化修改并推断可解释的断言，帮助工程师理解故障触发条件而无需访问内部模型细节。

Abstract: Verification and validation of cyber-physical systems (CPS) via large-scale simulation often surface failures that are hard to interpret, especially when triggered by interactions between continuous and discrete behaviors at specific events or times. Existing debugging techniques can localize anomalies to specific model components, but they provide little insight into the input-signal values and timing conditions that trigger violations, or the minimal, precisely timed changes that could have prevented the failure. In this article, we introduce DeCaF, a counterfactual-guided explanation and assertion-based characterization framework for CPS debugging. Given a failing test input, DeCaF generates counterfactual changes to the input signals that transform the test from failing to passing. These changes are designed to be minimal, necessary, and sufficient to precisely restore correctness. Then, it infers assertions as logical predicates over inputs that generalize recovery conditions in an interpretable form engineers can reason about, without requiring access to internal model details. Our approach combines three counterfactual generators with two causal models, and infers success assertions. Across three CPS case studies, DeCaF achieves its best success rate with KD-Tree Nearest Neighbors combined with M5 model tree, while Genetic Algorithm combined with Random Forest provides the strongest balance between success and causal precision.

</details>


### [292] [MVOS_HSI: A Python Library for Preprocessing Agricultural Crop Hyperspectral Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07656)
*Rishik Aggarwal,Krisha Joshi,Pappu Kumar Yadav,Jianwei Qin,Thomas F. Burks,Moon S. Kim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MVOS_HSI是一个开源Python库，提供端到端的高光谱成像处理工作流，专门用于植物叶片级数据分析，旨在解决现有脚本分散、难以共享和复现的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高光谱成像（HSI）能够无损地研究植物性状，但数据处理通常具有挑战性。许多实验室依赖组织松散的实验室特定MATLAB或Python脚本，这使得工作流程难以共享，结果难以复现。

Method: MVOS_HSI提供完整的端到端工作流：从校准原始ENVI文件开始，基于多个植被指数（NDVI、CIRedEdge和GCI）检测和裁剪单个叶片，包含用于机器学习的数据增强工具，以及可视化光谱曲线的实用程序。可作为可导入的Python库或命令行工具使用。

Result: 开发了一个开源Python库，代码和文档已在GitHub上提供。该软件整合了高光谱成像处理的常见任务，支持作为库导入或命令行运行。

Conclusion: 通过将这些常见任务整合到单一软件包中，MVOS_HSI帮助研究人员在植物表型分析中产生一致且可复现的结果。

Abstract: Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) allows researchers to study plant traits non-destructively. By capturing hundreds of narrow spectral bands per pixel, it reveals details about plant biochemistry and stress that standard cameras miss. However, processing this data is often challenging. Many labs still rely on loosely organized collections of lab-specific MATLAB or Python scripts, which makes workflows difficult to share and results difficult to reproduce. MVOS_HSI is an open-source Python library that provides an end-to-end workflow for processing leaf-level HSI data. The software handles everything from calibrating raw ENVI files to detecting and clipping individual leaves based on multiple vegetation indices (NDVI, CIRedEdge and GCI). It also includes tools for data augmentation to create training-time variations for machine learning and utilities to visualize spectral profiles. MVOS_HSI can be used as an importable Python library or run directly from the command line. The code and documentation are available on GitHub. By consolidating these common tasks into a single package, MVOS_HSI helps researchers produce consistent and reproducible results in plant phenotyping

</details>


### [293] [ReCodeAgent: A Multi-Agent Workflow for Language-agnostic Translation and Validation of Large-scale Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07341)
*Ali Reza Ibrahimzada,Brandon Paulsen,Daniel Kroening,Reyhaneh Jabbarvand*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ReCodeAgent：首个完全自主的多智能体方法，用于语言无关的仓库级代码翻译与验证，支持多种编程语言对，显著提升翻译正确性和测试通过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仓库级代码翻译和验证技术通常只针对单一编程语言对，扩展新语言对需要复杂的工程工作。虽然编程智能体可以实现语言无关性，但目前尚无完全自主的智能体方法用于大规模程序的仓库级代码翻译与验证。

Method: 提出ReCodeAgent，一种自主的多智能体方法，用户只需提供源语言项目和目标语言，系统即可自动翻译和验证整个仓库。该方法利用智能体合成多种编程语言的代码，并自主使用特定于每种语言的分析工具。

Result: 在118个真实项目（平均1975行代码，43个翻译单元）的评估中，ReCodeAgent在翻译正确性上持续优于现有技术，在真实测试上的通过率提高了60.8%，平均成本15.3美元。多智能体架构相比单智能体架构，测试通过率提高40.4%，轨迹缩短28%且效率更高。

Conclusion: ReCodeAgent是首个实现高翻译成功率的语言无关仓库级代码翻译与验证技术，其多智能体架构设计对性能有显著影响，为大规模代码迁移提供了有效的自动化解决方案。

Abstract: Most repository-level code translation and validation techniques have been evaluated on a single source-target programming language (PL) pair, owing to the complex engineering effort required to adapt new PL pairs. Programming agents can enable PL-agnosticism in repository-level code translation and validation: they can synthesize code across many PLs and autonomously use existing tools specific to each PL's analysis. However, state-of-the-art has yet to offer a fully autonomous agentic approach for repository-level code translation and validation of large-scale programs. This paper proposes ReCodeAgent, an autonomous multi-agent approach for language-agnostic repository-level code translation and validation.
