First, fusion architecture dominates: FiLM outperforms concatenation by 24.2 percentage points and additive conditioning by 8.6 pp; how you incorporate context matters more than whether you include it. Second, context enables otherwise impossible predictions: on data-scarce CYP3A4 (67 training compounds), multi-task transfer achieves 0.686 AUC where per-target Random Forest collapses to 0.238. Third, context can systematically hurt: distribution mismatch causes 10.2 pp degradation on BACE1; few-shot adaptation consistently underperforms zero-shot. Beyond methodology, we expose fundamental flaws in standard benchmarking: 1-nearest-neighbor Tanimoto achieves 0.991 AUC on DUD-E without any learning, and 50% of actives leak from training data, rendering absolute performance metrics meaningless. Our temporal split evaluation (train up to 2020, test 2021-2024) achieves stable 0.843 AUC with no degradation, providing the first rigorous evidence that context-conditional molecular representations generalize to future chemical space.

</details>


### [483] [Efficient Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts with Theoretical Generalization Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06515)
*Mohammed Nowaz Rabbani Chowdhury,Kaoutar El Maghraoui,Hsinyu Tsai,Naigang Wang,Geoffrey W. Burr,Liu Liu,Meng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于专家L2范数变化和神经元内方差的理论驱动专家级混合精度量化方法，在Switch Transformer和Mixtral等大规模MoE模型上实现更高精度和更低推理成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏MoE模型虽然通过激活少量专家减少计算量，但大量参数仍导致显著内存开销。现有混合精度方法需要大量计算进行位宽分配，且忽视了不同专家对量化敏感度的差异

Method: 提出理论驱动的专家级混合精度策略：1) 基于训练过程中路由器L2范数变化分配位宽，变化小的专家捕获低频关键特征，对量化更敏感，需要更高精度；2) 为避免高量化噪声，对神经元内方差大的专家也分配更高精度

Result: 在大规模MoE模型（包括Switch Transformer和Mixtral）上的实验表明，该方法比现有方法达到更高精度，同时减少推理成本，且位宽分配开销可忽略不计

Conclusion: 提出的专家级混合精度量化方法通过理论驱动的位宽分配策略，有效平衡了MoE模型的精度和效率，为大规模稀疏MoE模型的部署提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) allows scaling of language and vision models efficiently by activating only a small subset of experts per input. While this reduces computation, the large number of parameters still incurs substantial memory overhead during inference. Post-training quantization has been explored to address this issue. Because uniform quantization suffers from significant accuracy loss at low bit-widths, mixed-precision methods have been recently explored; however, they often require substantial computation for bit-width allocation and overlook the varying sensitivity of model performance to the quantization of different experts. We propose a theoretically grounded expert-wise mixed precision strategy that assigns bit-width to each expert primarily based on their change in routers l2 norm during training. Experts with smaller changes are shown to capture less frequent but critical features, and model performance is more sensitive to the quantization of these experts, thus requiring higher precision. Furthermore, to avoid allocating experts to lower precision that inject high quantization noise, experts with large maximum intra-neuron variance are also allocated higher precision. Experiments on large-scale MoE models, including Switch Transformer and Mixtral, show that our method achieves higher accuracy than existing approaches, while also reducing inference cost and incurring only negligible overhead for bit-width assignment.

</details>


### [484] [VLMShield: Efficient and Robust Defense of Vision-Language Models against Malicious Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06502)
*Peigui Qi,Kunsheng Tang,Yanpu Yu,Jialin Wu,Yide Song,Wenbo Zhou,Zhicong Huang,Cheng Hong,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VLMShield：基于多模态聚合特征提取的轻量级安全检测器，可高效识别视觉语言模型中的恶意提示攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）在视觉集成过程中对齐能力被削弱，面临恶意提示攻击的安全漏洞。现有防御方法在效率和鲁棒性方面存在不足。

Method: 首先提出多模态聚合特征提取（MAFE）框架，使CLIP能够处理长文本并将多模态信息融合为统一表示。基于MAFE提取的特征，发现良性提示和恶意提示具有不同的分布模式，据此开发了轻量级安全检测器VLMShield，作为即插即用解决方案。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在鲁棒性、效率和实用性等多个维度上表现出优越性能。

Conclusion: 该工作为更安全的多模态AI部署铺平了道路，代码已开源。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face significant safety vulnerabilities from malicious prompt attacks due to weakened alignment during visual integration. Existing defenses suffer from efficiency and robustness. To address these challenges, we first propose the Multimodal Aggregated Feature Extraction (MAFE) framework that enables CLIP to handle long text and fuse multimodal information into unified representations. Through empirical analysis of MAFE-extracted features, we discover distinct distributional patterns between benign and malicious prompts. Building upon this finding, we develop VLMShield, a lightweight safety detector that efficiently identifies multimodal malicious attacks as a plug-and-play solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance across multiple dimensions, including robustness, efficiency, and utility. Through our work, we hope to pave the way for more secure multimodal AI deployment. Code is available at [this https URL](https://github.com/pgqihere/VLMShield).

</details>


### [485] [Transformer See, Transformer Do: Copying as an Intermediate Step in Learning Analogical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06501)
*Philipp Hellwig,Willem Zuidema,Claire E. Stevenson,Martha Lewis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用元学习组合性方法训练Transformer解决字母串类比推理任务，通过引导模型关注关键信息元素和异质数据集提升泛化能力，但无法泛化到全新变换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 类比推理是人类智能的标志，但开发具有鲁棒人类类比推理能力的人工智能系统一直很困难。本研究旨在探索如何让Transformer模型学习并泛化类比推理能力。

Method: 使用元学习组合性方法训练Transformer模型处理字母串类比任务。通过在训练数据中包含复制任务来引导模型关注最信息丰富的元素，并使用异质数据集提升泛化能力。采用3层编码器-解码器架构，并通过可解释性分析识别模型的计算算法。

Result: 1) 包含复制任务使字母串类比变得可学习；2) 异质数据集训练提升对新字母表的泛化能力，3层模型优于大多数前沿模型；3) MLC方法能部分泛化到训练过的变换组合，但不能泛化到全新变换；4) 识别出近似模型计算的算法，可通过该算法精确引导模型行为。

Conclusion: MLC方法能有效提升Transformer的类比推理能力，但泛化能力有限。研究为理解大模型的泛化能力和人类类比推理的相似性提供了启示，模型学习到的算法近似人类推理过程。

Abstract: Analogical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, enabling us to solve new problems by transferring knowledge from one situation to another. Yet, developing artificial intelligence systems capable of robust human-like analogical reasoning has proven difficult. In this work, we train transformers using Meta-Learning for Compositionality (MLC) on an analogical reasoning task (letter-string analogies) and assess their generalization capabilities. We find that letter-string analogies become learnable when guiding the models to attend to the most informative problem elements induced by including copying tasks in the training data. Furthermore, generalization to new alphabets becomes better when models are trained with more heterogeneous datasets, where our 3-layer encoder-decoder model outperforms most frontier models. The MLC approach also enables some generalization to compositions of trained transformations, but not to completely novel transformations. To understand how the model operates, we identify an algorithm that approximates the model's computations. We verify this using interpretability analyses and show that the model can be steered precisely according to expectations derived from the algorithm. Finally, we discuss implications of our findings for generalization capabilities of larger models and parallels to human analogical reasoning.

</details>


### [486] [Optimal Rates for Pure {\varepsilon}-Differentially Private Stochastic Convex Optimization with Heavy Tails](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06492)
*Andrew Lowy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在纯ε-差分隐私下具有重尾梯度的随机凸优化问题，通过假设有界k阶矩而非有界Lipschitz参数，实现了更尖锐的过量风险界限，并首次刻画了纯ε-DP重尾SCO的极小极大最优率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注近似(ε,δ)-DP下的重尾随机凸优化，而纯ε-DP情况的最优率尚未解决。传统方法假设损失函数的Lipschitz参数有界，这限制了重尾分布的处理能力。本文旨在放宽这一假设，仅要求梯度的k阶矩有界，从而处理无界、重尾的随机梯度分布，并获得更尖锐的过量风险界限。

Method: 提出了一种基于私有优化经验损失的Lipschitz扩展的新框架。算法在多项式时间内以高概率达到最优率，对于某些结构问题类（如铰链/ReLU型和绝对值损失），即使最坏情况Lipschitz参数无限，也能在概率1下多项式时间内实现相同的过量风险保证。

Result: 首次刻画了纯ε-DP重尾随机凸优化的极小极大最优过量风险率（达到对数因子）。算法在多项式时间内以高概率达到该最优率，当最坏情况Lipschitz参数多项式有界时，以概率1在多项式时间内运行。对于重要结构问题类，即使最坏情况Lipschitz参数无限，也能在概率1下多项式时间内实现相同的过量风险保证。

Conclusion: 本文解决了纯ε-DP重尾随机凸优化的开放问题，通过仅假设梯度矩有界而非Lipschitz参数有界，扩展了处理重尾分布的能力。提出的新框架能够在多项式时间内实现极小极大最优率，并为重要结构问题类提供了更强的保证。同时提供了新的高概率下界作为补充。

Abstract: We study stochastic convex optimization (SCO) with heavy-tailed gradients under pure epsilon-differential privacy (DP). Instead of assuming a bound on the worst-case Lipschitz parameter of the loss, we assume only a bounded k-th moment. This assumption allows for unbounded, heavy-tailed stochastic gradient distributions, and can yield sharper excess risk bounds. The minimax optimal rate for approximate (epsilon, delta)-DP SCO is known in this setting, but the pure epsilon-DP case has remained open. We characterize the minimax optimal excess-risk rate for pure epsilon-DP heavy-tailed SCO up to logarithmic factors. Our algorithm achieves this rate in polynomial time with high probability. Moreover, it runs in polynomial time with probability 1 when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is polynomially bounded. For important structured problem classes - including hinge/ReLU-type and absolute-value losses on Euclidean balls, ellipsoids, and polytopes - we achieve the same excess-risk guarantee in polynomial time with probability 1 even when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is infinite. Our approach is based on a novel framework for privately optimizing Lipschitz extensions of the empirical loss. We complement our excess risk upper bound with a novel high probability lower bound.

</details>


### [487] [Discrete Flow Matching Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06491)
*Maojiang Su,Po-Chung Hsieh,Weimin Wu,Mingcheng Lu,Jiunhau Chen,Jerry Yao-Chieh Hu,Han Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DoMinO是一个统一的强化学习框架，用于微调离散流匹配模型，将采样过程视为多步马尔可夫决策过程，避免传统RL微调方法的偏差估计器和似然替代，并通过总变差正则化防止策略崩溃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL微调方法通常依赖于有偏的辅助估计器或似然替代，这可能导致采样器性能下降或策略崩溃。需要一种既能保持原始DFM采样器特性，又能避免这些问题的统一框架。

Method: 将DFM采样过程重新表述为多步马尔可夫决策过程，将奖励最大化转化为鲁棒的RL目标。引入总变差正则化器保持微调分布接近预训练分布，防止策略崩溃。理论上建立了DoMinO离散化误差的上界和正则化器的可处理上界。

Result: 在调控DNA序列设计任务中，DoMinO相比之前最佳的奖励驱动基线方法，实现了更强的预测增强子活性和更好的序列自然性。正则化进一步改善了与自然序列分布的匹配度，同时保持了强大的功能性能。

Conclusion: DoMinO为可控离散序列生成提供了一个有用的框架，既能有效进行RL微调，又能避免传统方法的缺陷，在保持序列自然性的同时提升功能性能。

Abstract: We introduce Discrete flow Matching policy Optimization (DoMinO), a unified framework for Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning Discrete Flow Matching (DFM) models under a broad class of policy gradient methods. Our key idea is to view the DFM sampling procedure as a multi-step Markov Decision Process. This perspective provides a simple and transparent reformulation of fine-tuning reward maximization as a robust RL objective. Consequently, it not only preserves the original DFM samplers but also avoids biased auxiliary estimators and likelihood surrogates used by many prior RL fine-tuning methods. To prevent policy collapse, we also introduce new total-variation regularizers to keep the fine-tuned distribution close to the pretrained one. Theoretically, we establish an upper bound on the discretization error of DoMinO and tractable upper bounds for the regularizers. Experimentally, we evaluate DoMinO on regulatory DNA sequence design. DoMinO achieves stronger predicted enhancer activity and better sequence naturalness than the previous best reward-driven baselines. The regularization further improves alignment with the natural sequence distribution while preserving strong functional performance. These results establish DoMinO as an useful framework for controllable discrete sequence generation.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [488] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的分散式非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，难以在具有高空间优先级和资源约束的任务中实现高效覆盖。需要一种能够桥接个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配的严格拉格朗日框架。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个严格的拉格朗日框架，将问题表述为随机MPC类问题，最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本。该方法在随机LTI动力学下确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度，并通过可达性分析建立形式收敛保证。

Result: 数值结果表明，随机D²OC实现了鲁棒的分散式覆盖，在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。关键贡献是通过可达性分析建立了形式收敛保证，即使在存在过程和测量噪声的情况下也能提供有界的跟踪误差。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体系统的分散式非均匀区域覆盖问题提供了一个严格的理论框架，通过桥接个体动力学与集体分布匹配，实现了优于现有启发式方法的性能，并提供了形式收敛保证。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


### [489] [Parameter-free non-ergodic extragradient algorithms for solving monotone variational inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07662)
*Lingqing Shen,Fatma Kılınç-Karzan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出参数无关的外梯度方法，在单调变分不等式问题上实现非渐近的最后迭代保证，无需全局光滑性信息


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有外梯度方法依赖问题特定的全局光滑信息选择步长，且理论分析多关注遍历平均而非实际性能更优的最后迭代。需要开发参数无关且具有最后迭代保证的方法，特别是对于全局光滑性不现实的场景。

Method: 开发参数无关的外梯度方法：1) 针对全局Lipschitz算子，实现o(1/√T)的最后迭代速率；2) 通过回溯线搜索扩展到局部Lipschitz算子，保持参数无关性；3) 避免使用全局光滑信息，使方法适用于更广泛的问题类别。

Result: 1) 在全局Lipschitz算子下获得o(1/√T)的最后迭代速率；2) 通过回溯线搜索将框架扩展到局部Lipschitz算子，保持相同速率和参数无关性；3) 数值实验在双线性矩阵博弈、LASSO、极小极大组公平性和最大熵采样松弛等任务上验证了方法的广泛适用性和优越性能。

Conclusion: 提出的参数无关外梯度方法实现了非渐近的最后迭代保证，无需全局光滑信息，适用于更广泛的问题类别，包括全局光滑性不现实的场景，在理论和实验上都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Monotone variational inequalities (VIs) provide a unifying framework for convex minimization, equilibrium computation, and convex-concave saddle-point problems. Extragradient-type methods are among the most effective first-order algorithms for such problems, but their performance hinges critically on stepsize selection. While most existing theory focuses on ergodic averages of the iterates, practical performance is often driven by the significantly stronger behavior of the last iterate. Moreover, available last-iterate guarantees typically rely on fixed stepsizes chosen using problem-specific global smoothness information, which is often difficult to estimate accurately and may not even be applicable. In this paper, we develop parameter-free extragradient methods with non-asymptotic last-iterate guarantees for constrained monotone VIs. For globally Lipschitz operators, our algorithm achieves an $o(1/\sqrt{T})$ last-iterate rate. We then extend the framework to locally Lipschitz operators via backtracking line search and obtain the same rate while preserving parameter-freeness, thereby making parameter-free last-iterate methods applicable to important problem classes for which global smoothness is unrealistic. Our numerical experiments on bilinear matrix games, LASSO, minimax group fairness, and state-of-the-art maximum entropy sampling relaxations demonstrate wide applicability of our results as well as strong last-iterate performance and significant improvements over existing methods.

</details>


### [490] [Continuous-Time Dynamics of the Difference-of-Convex Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06926)
*Yi-Shuai Niu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 论文研究光滑DC分解下凸差算法(DCA)的连续时间结构，将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的显式欧拉离散化，提出阻尼DCA方案，分析其收敛性，并探讨不同DC分解如何通过凸分量生成的度量影响连续动力学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究DCA算法的连续时间结构，从动力系统视角理解DCA的收敛行为，通过将DCA解释为非线性系统的离散化，建立连续流与离散算法之间的联系，为算法设计和收敛分析提供新的几何见解。

Method: 1. 在双坐标下将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的全步长显式欧拉离散化；2. 提出阻尼DCA方案（也是Bregman正则化DCA变体）；3. 分析阻尼方案的单调下降、渐近临界性、KL收敛等性质；4. 研究步长趋于零时得到的Hessian-Riemannian梯度流；5. 建立不同DC分解与Bregman几何的联系。

Result: 1. 阻尼DCA方案具有单调下降性、渐近临界性，在KL条件下有界轨迹收敛，在度量DC-PL不等式下获得全局线性收敛率；2. 极限流具有精确能量恒等式，在度量相对误差界下获得显式全局收敛率，在KL假设下有限长度和单点收敛，在非退化局部极小值附近局部指数收敛；3. 揭示了全局-局部权衡：半松弛方案提供最佳全局保证，全步长方案在非退化极小值附近局部最快；4. 不同DC分解通过凸分量生成的度量诱导不同的连续动力学。

Conclusion: 通过连续时间视角为DCA提供了统一的几何框架，将DCA与Bregman几何联系起来，揭示了DC分解质量对算法性能的影响，为算法设计和收敛分析提供了新的理论工具和几何准则。

Abstract: We study the continuous-time structure of the difference-of-convex algorithm (DCA) for smooth DC decompositions with a strongly convex component. In dual coordinates, classical DCA is exactly the full-step explicit Euler discretization of a nonlinear autonomous system. This viewpoint motivates a damped DCA scheme, which is also a Bregman-regularized DCA variant, and whose vanishing-step limit yields a Hessian-Riemannian gradient flow generated by the convex part of the decomposition. For the damped scheme we prove monotone descent, asymptotic criticality, Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz convergence under boundedness, and a global linear rate under a metric DC-PL inequality. For the limiting flow we establish an exact energy identity, asymptotic criticality of bounded trajectories, explicit global rates under metric relative error bounds, finite-length and single-point convergence under a Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz hypothesis, and local exponential convergence near nondegenerate local minima. The analysis also reveals a global-local tradeoff: the half-relaxed scheme gives the best provable global guarantee in our framework, while the full-step scheme is locally fastest near a nondegenerate minimum. Finally, we show that different DC decompositions of the same objective induce different continuous dynamics through the metric generated by the convex component, providing a geometric criterion for decomposition quality and linking DCA with Bregman geometry.

</details>


### [491] [A Generalized Sinkhorn Algorithm for Mean-Field Schrödinger Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06531)
*Asmaa Eldesoukey,Yongxin Chen,Abhishek Halder*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种求解平均场薛定谔桥问题的Sinkhorn型递归算法，通过推广Hopf-Cole变换处理非局部相互作用带来的非凸性挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平均场薛定谔桥问题在指导具有非局部相互作用的扩散过程从初始分布到达目标分布方面具有重要应用，但非局部相互作用导致问题非凸，计算困难，需要有效的数值算法

Method: 推广Hopf-Cole变换来处理平均场薛定谔桥问题，并基于此设计Sinkhorn型递归算法求解相关的积分-偏微分方程组

Result: 在相互作用势的温和假设下，讨论了所提算法的收敛性保证，并通过具有排斥和吸引相互作用的数值算例验证了理论贡献

Conclusion: 成功开发了求解平均场薛定谔桥问题的有效数值方法，解决了非局部相互作用带来的计算挑战，为大尺度多智能体系统建模提供了实用工具

Abstract: The mean-field Schrödinger bridge (MFSB) problem concerns designing a minimum-effort controller that guides a diffusion process with nonlocal interaction to reach a given distribution from another by a fixed deadline. Unlike the standard Schrödinger bridge, the dynamical constraint for MFSB is the mean-field limit of a population of interacting agents with controls. It serves as a natural model for large-scale multi-agent systems. The MFSB is computationally challenging because the nonlocal interaction makes the problem nonconvex. We propose a generalization of the Hopf-Cole transform for MFSB and, building on it, design a Sinkhorn-type recursive algorithm to solve the associated system of integro-PDEs. Under mild assumptions on the interaction potential, we discuss convergence guarantees for the proposed algorithm. We present numerical examples with repulsive and attractive interactions to illustrate the theoretical contributions.

</details>


### [492] [Stochastic Auto-conditioned Fast Gradient Methods with Optimal Rates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06525)
*Yao Ji,Guanghui Lan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机自适应条件快速梯度法，无需问题参数先验知识，在标准有界条件方差假设下达到最优迭代和样本复杂度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机复合凸优化中，在不了解问题参数先验知识的情况下实现最优收敛率是一个核心挑战。现有参数无关随机方法要么无法达到加速收敛率，要么依赖限制性假设（如有界域、有界梯度、迭代时域先验知识或严格次高斯噪声）。需要开发一种完全自适应的随机加速方法。

Method: 提出随机自适应条件快速梯度法，是确定性自适应条件快速梯度法的随机变体。该方法完全自适应于Lipschitz常数、迭代时域和噪声水平，支持自适应步长选择和自适应小批量大小，无需线搜索过程。

Result: 在标准有界条件方差假设下，随机自适应条件快速梯度法达到最优迭代复杂度O(1/√ε)和最优样本复杂度O(1/ε²)。

Conclusion: 成功将自适应条件快速梯度法扩展到随机设置，解决了参数无关随机加速的开放问题，在标准假设下实现了最优收敛性能。

Abstract: Achieving optimal rates for stochastic composite convex optimization without prior knowledge of problem parameters remains a central challenge. In the deterministic setting, the auto-conditioned fast gradient method has recently been proposed to attain optimal accelerated rates without line-search procedures or prior knowledge of the Lipschitz smoothness constant, providing a natural prototype for parameter-free acceleration. However, extending this approach to the stochastic setting has proven technically challenging and remains open. Existing parameter-free stochastic methods either fail to achieve accelerated rates or rely on restrictive assumptions, such as bounded domains, bounded gradients, prior knowledge of the iteration horizon, or strictly sub-Gaussian noise. To address these limitations, we propose a stochastic variant of the auto-conditioned fast gradient method, referred to as stochastic AC-FGM. The proposed method is fully adaptive to the Lipschitz constant, the iteration horizon, and the noise level, enabling both adaptive stepsize selection and adaptive mini-batch sizing without line-search procedures. Under standard bounded conditional variance assumptions, we show that stochastic AC-FGM achieves the optimal iteration complexity of $O(1/\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ and the optimal sample complexity of $O(1/\varepsilon^2)$.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [493] [XR-CareerAssist: An Immersive Platform for Personalised Career Guidance Leveraging Extended Reality and Multimodal AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06901)
*N. D. Tantaroudas,A. J. McCracken,I. Karachalios,E. Papatheou,V. Pastrikakis*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: XR-CareerAssist：一个结合扩展现实（XR）和多种人工智能模块的沉浸式多语言职业指导平台，通过语音交互、机器翻译、对话助手、视觉语言模型和文本转语音等技术，提供个性化、可视化的职业发展体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统职业指导平台依赖静态文本界面，缺乏互动性和用户参与度，且忽视职业发展的叙事维度。现有的计算机辅助职业指导系统自1960年代以来发展有限，交互性不足，无法提供沉浸式、个性化的职业指导体验。

Method: 开发XR-CareerAssist平台，整合扩展现实（XR）与五个AI模块：1）自动语音识别实现语音交互；2）神经机器翻译支持英、希、法、意四种语言；3）基于Langchain的对话培训助手提供个性化对话；4）基于BLIP的视觉语言模型生成职业可视化；5）AWS Polly文本转语音通过交互式3D虚拟形象呈现。职业轨迹以动态桑基图形式呈现，数据来源于超过10万个匿名职业档案。平台使用Unity开发，面向Meta Quest 3，后端服务托管在AWS上。

Result: 在埃克塞特大学进行的试点评估（23名参与者）显示：语音识别准确率达95.6%，整体用户满意度78.3%，系统响应性获得91.3%的积极评价。用户反馈指导了后续在运动舒适度、音频清晰度和文本可读性方面的改进。

Conclusion: XR-CareerAssist展示了XR与AI融合如何创造更具吸引力、可访问性和有效性的职业发展工具。五个AI模块在单一沉浸式环境中的整合提供了多模态交互体验，使其区别于现有职业指导平台，为未来职业指导技术的发展提供了新方向。

Abstract: Conventional career guidance platforms rely on static, text-driven interfaces that struggle to engage users or deliver personalised, evidence-based insights. Although Computer-Assisted Career Guidance Systems have evolved since the 1960s, they remain limited in interactivity and pay little attention to the narrative dimensions of career development. We introduce XR-CareerAssist, a platform that unifies Extended Reality (XR) with several Artificial Intelligence (AI) modules to deliver immersive, multilingual career guidance. The system integrates Automatic Speech Recognition for voice-driven interaction, Neural Machine Translation across English, Greek, French, and Italian, a Langchain-based conversational Training Assistant for personalised dialogue, a BLIP-based Vision-Language model for career visualisations, and AWS Polly Text-to-Speech delivered through an interactive 3D avatar. Career trajectories are rendered as dynamic Sankey diagrams derived from a repository of more than 100,000 anonymised professional profiles. The application was built in Unity for Meta Quest 3, with backend services hosted on AWS. A pilot evaluation at the University of Exeter with 23 participants returned 95.6% speech recognition accuracy, 78.3% overall user satisfaction, and 91.3% favourable ratings for system responsiveness, with feedback informing subsequent improvements to motion comfort, audio clarity, and text legibility. XR-CareerAssist demonstrates how the fusion of XR and AI can produce more engaging, accessible, and effective career development tools, with the integration of five AI modules within a single immersive environment yielding a multimodal interaction experience that distinguishes it from existing career guidance platforms.

</details>


<div id='cs.CC'></div>

# cs.CC [[Back]](#toc)

### [494] [Toward a Tractability Frontier for Exact Relevance Certification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07349)
*Tristan Simas*

Main category: cs.CC

TL;DR: 论文证明了一个关于精确相关性认证的元不可能性定理：对于闭包封闭域上的正确分类器，无法通过可高效检查的结构谓词来精确刻画优化器-商可实现性的前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究精确相关性认证问题，即确定在坐标结构决策问题中哪些坐标是确定最优动作所必需的。虽然已有可处理族承认有限原始基，但优化器-商可实现性是最大的，仅靠商形状无法刻画前沿。

Method: 通过构造四个阻碍族（主导对集中、边缘掩蔽、幽灵动作集中、加性/状态偏移集中）的同轨道分歧，使用动作无关、对目标的仿射见证来证明元不可能性定理。利用结构收敛、零失真摘要、商熵界和支持计数论证来解释闭包定律的规范性。

Result: 证明了对于闭包封闭域上的任何正确可处理性分类器，都无法在这些阻碍族上获得精确刻画。闭包轨道一致性是由正确性强制而非作为不变性公理假设的。

Conclusion: 在精确相关性认证中，不存在能够通过可高效检查的结构谓词来精确刻画优化器-商可实现性前沿的正确分类器，即使分类器在闭包封闭域上运行且不依赖于特定的可容许性包。

Abstract: Exact relevance certification asks which coordinates are necessary to determine the optimal action in a coordinate-structured decision problem. The tractable families treated here admit a finite primitive basis, but optimizer-quotient realizability is maximal, so quotient shape alone cannot characterize the frontier.
  We prove a meta-impossibility theorem for efficiently checkable structural predicates invariant under the theorem-forced closure laws of exact certification. Structural convergence with zero-distortion summaries, quotient entropy bounds, and support-counting arguments explains why those closure laws are canonical. We establish the theorem by constructing same-orbit disagreements for four obstruction families, namely dominant-pair concentration, margin masking, ghost-action concentration, and additive/statewise offset concentration, using action-independent, pair-targeted affine witnesses. Consequently no correct tractability classifier on a closure-closed domain yields an exact characterization over these families. Here closure-orbit agreement is forced by correctness rather than assumed as an invariance axiom. The result therefore applies to correct classifiers on closure-closed domains, not only to classifiers presented through a designated admissibility package.

</details>


<div id='eess.AS'></div>

# eess.AS [[Back]](#toc)

### [495] [TASU2: Controllable CTC Simulation for Alignment and Low-Resource Adaptation of Speech LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08384)
*Jing Peng,Chenghao Wang,Yi Yang,Lirong Qian,Junjie Li,Yu Xi,Shuai Wang,Kai Yu*

Main category: eess.AS

TL;DR: TASU2：可控CTC模拟框架，通过模拟指定WER范围内的CTC后验分布，生成与声学解码接口更匹配的文本监督，实现无需TTS的渐进式后训练课程


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音LLM后训练需要高效跨模态对齐和鲁棒低资源适应，但收集大规模音频-文本对成本高昂。现有文本对齐方法如TASU通过从转录本模拟CTC后验来减轻负担，但对不确定性和错误率的控制有限，课程设计主要依赖启发式方法

Method: 提出TASU2框架，在指定词错误率(WER)范围内可控地模拟CTC后验分布，生成与声学解码接口更匹配的文本监督，实现无需文本转语音(TTS)的原则性后训练课程，平滑调整监督难度

Result: 在多个源到目标适应设置中，TASU2在领域内和领域外识别方面优于TASU，持续超越包括纯文本微调和TTS增强在内的强基线，同时减轻源领域性能下降

Conclusion: TASU2通过可控CTC模拟提供更精确的文本监督，实现了更有效的语音LLM后训练课程，在减少数据收集成本的同时提高了适应性能

Abstract: Speech LLM post-training increasingly relies on efficient cross-modal alignment and robust low-resource adaptation, yet collecting large-scale audio-text pairs remains costly. Text-only alignment methods such as TASU reduce this burden by simulating CTC posteriors from transcripts, but they provide limited control over uncertainty and error rate, making curriculum design largely heuristic. We propose \textbf{TASU2}, a controllable CTC simulation framework that simulates CTC posterior distributions under a specified WER range, producing text-derived supervision that better matches the acoustic decoding interface. This enables principled post-training curricula that smoothly vary supervision difficulty without TTS. Across multiple source-to-target adaptation settings, TASU2 improves in-domain and out-of-domain recognition over TASU, and consistently outperforms strong baselines including text-only fine-tuning and TTS-based augmentation, while mitigating source-domain performance degradation.

</details>


<div id='cs.DL'></div>

# cs.DL [[Back]](#toc)

### [496] [The Shrinking Lifespan of LLMs in Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07530)
*Ana Trišović*

Main category: cs.DL

TL;DR: 该研究首次大规模实证分析了科学家如何随时间采纳和放弃语言模型，发现科学采用遵循倒U型轨迹（科学采用曲线），且该曲线正在压缩——新模型发布年份越晚，达到采用峰值的时间越短。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展定律描述了语言模型能力如何随计算和数据增长，但未说明模型发布后的生命周期。本研究旨在填补这一空白，实证分析科学家如何随时间采纳和放弃语言模型，揭示模型科学相关性的动态变化。

Method: 追踪62个LLM在2018-2025年间超过10.8万篇引用论文，每个模型至少有三年发布后数据。对每个引用进行分类（主动采用vs背景参考），构建原始引用计数无法解析的每个模型的采用轨迹。

Result: 发现三个规律：1）科学采用遵循倒U型轨迹（科学采用曲线）；2）曲线正在压缩——每增加一个发布年份，达到峰值采用的时间减少27%；3）发布时间是生命周期动态的最强预测因子，比架构、开放性或规模更重要，尽管模型规模和访问方式对总采用量仍有适度预测力。

Conclusion: 这些发现补充了扩展定律，揭示了采用侧的规律性，表明推动快速能力进步的相同力量可能正在压缩科学相关性。发布时间主导模型生命周期动态，而非模型级属性。

Abstract: Scaling laws describe how language model capabilities grow with compute and data, but say nothing about how long a model matters once released. We provide the first large-scale empirical account of how scientists adopt and abandon language models over time. We track 62 LLMs across over 108k citing papers (2018-2025), each with at least three years of post-release data, and classify every citation as active adoption or background reference to construct per-model adoption trajectories that raw citation counts cannot resolve. We find three regularities. First, scientific adoption follows an inverted-U trajectory: usage rises after release, peaks, and declines as newer models appear, a pattern we term the \textit{scientific adoption curve}. Second, this curve is compressing: each additional release year is associated with a 27\% reduction in time-to-peak adoption ($p < 0.001$), robust to minimum-age thresholds and controls for model size. Third, release timing dominates model-level attributes as a predictor of lifecycle dynamics. Release year explains both time-to-peak and scientific lifespan more strongly than architecture, openness, or scale, though model size and access modality retain modest predictive power for total adoption volume. Together, these findings complement scaling laws with adoption-side regularities and suggest that the forces driving rapid capability progress may be the same forces compressing scientific relevance.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [497] [Multi-Modal Learning meets Genetic Programming: Analyzing Alignment in Latent Space Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08324)
*Benjamin Léger,Kazem Meidani,Christian Gagné*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文研究了SNIP模型在符号回归中的有效性，发现其跨模态对齐在优化过程中并未改善，且对齐过于粗糙，无法有效指导符号空间搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SNIP模型通过对比预训练将符号表达式映射到连续空间，声称能实现有效的双模态优化。然而，类似CLIP的模型通常只实现粗粒度对齐，作者质疑SNIP是否真正实现了其承诺的细粒度对齐和有效优化。

Method: 通过实验分析SNIP模型在符号回归任务中的表现，特别关注：(1) 优化过程中跨模态对齐是否改善，(2) 学习的对齐是否足够精细以指导符号空间搜索。

Result: 实验结果表明：(1) 即使适应度提高，跨模态对齐在优化过程中并未改善；(2) SNIP学习的对齐过于粗糙，无法在符号空间中进行有效的原则性搜索。

Conclusion: 虽然多模态潜在空间优化在符号回归中具有巨大潜力，但当前SNIP模型未能实现有效的对齐引导优化。细粒度对齐是实现这一目标的关键方向，需要未来进一步研究。

Abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) aims to discover mathematical expressions from data, a task traditionally tackled using Genetic Programming (GP) through combinatorial search over symbolic structures. Latent Space Optimization (LSO) methods use neural encoders to map symbolic expressions into continuous spaces, transforming the combinatorial search into continuous optimization. SNIP (Meidani et al., 2024), a contrastive pre-training model inspired by CLIP, advances LSO by introducing a multi-modal approach: aligning symbolic and numeric encoders in a shared latent space to learn the phenotype-genotype mapping, enabling optimization in the numeric space to implicitly guide symbolic search. However, this relies on fine-grained cross-modal alignment, whereas literature on similar models like CLIP reveals that such an alignment is typically coarse-grained. In this paper, we investigate whether SNIP delivers on its promise of effective bi-modal optimization for SR. Our experiments show that: (1) cross-modal alignment does not improve during optimization, even as fitness increases, and (2) the alignment learned by SNIP is too coarse to efficiently conduct principled search in the symbolic space. These findings reveal that while multi-modal LSO holds significant potential for SR, effective alignment-guided optimization remains unrealized in practice, highlighting fine-grained alignment as a critical direction for future work.

</details>


### [498] [When Switching Algorithms Helps: A Theoretical Study of Online Algorithm Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07473)
*Denis Antipov,Carola Doerr*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 在线算法选择首次理论证明：在OneMax问题上，通过适当切换(1+λ)EA和(1+(λ,λ))GA算法，可获得O(n log log n)期望时间，优于任一算法单独使用的最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线算法选择虽然经验上有效，但缺乏理论证明其能带来渐进加速。本文旨在提供首个理论实例，证明算法切换能在OneMax问题上实现渐进加速，并为何时及如何切换提供理论指导。

Method: 研究(1+λ)EA和(1+(λ,λ))GA在OneMax问题上的切换策略。首先在理想切换规则下分析性能，然后提出实际可行的切换策略。分析结合固定起点和固定目标视角，展示不同算法在优化过程不同阶段的优势。

Result: 通过适当选择两种算法的种群大小，并在最优时间从(1+λ)EA切换到(1+(λ,λ))GA，可获得O(n log log n)期望时间找到最优解，优于任一算法单独使用的最优性能Θ(n√(log n log log log n/log log n))。

Conclusion: 本文首次为在线算法选择提供了理论证明，展示了算法切换能在OneMax问题上实现渐进加速。这为在线算法选择的理论理解开辟了有前景的路径，并提供了实用的切换策略。

Abstract: Online algorithm selection (OAS) aims to adapt the optimization process to changes in the fitness landscape and is expected to outperform any single algorithm from a given portfolio. Although this expectation is supported by numerous empirical studies, there are currently no theoretical results proving that OAS can yield asymptotic speedups (apart from some artificial examples for hyper-heuristics). Moreover, theory-based guidelines for when and how to switch between algorithms are largely missing.
  In this paper, we present the first theoretical example in which switching between two algorithms -- the $(1+λ)$ EA and the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA -- solves the OneMax problem asymptotically faster than either algorithm used in isolation. We show that an appropriate choice of population sizes for the two algorithms allows the optimum to be reached in $O(n\log\log n)$ expected time, faster than the $Θ(n\sqrt{\frac{\log n \log\log\log n}{\log\log n}})$ runtime of the best of these two algorithms with optimally tuned parameters.
  We first establish this bound under an idealized switching rule that changes from the $(1+λ)$ to the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA at the optimal time. We then propose a realistic switching strategy that achieves the same performance. Our analysis combines fixed-start and fixed-target perspectives, illustrating how different algorithms dominate at different stages of the optimization process. This approach offers a promising path toward a deeper theoretical understanding of OAS.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [499] [Differentially Private Language Generation and Identification in the Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08504)
*Anay Mehrotra,Grigoris Velegkas,Xifan Yu,Felix Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在差分隐私约束下的极限语言生成与识别问题，揭示了隐私对生成任务无定性影响但对识别任务造成根本性障碍，并展示了对抗性与随机性设置之间的分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在差分隐私约束下的极限语言生成与识别问题，探索隐私保护如何影响语言学习的基本能力，特别是比较生成与识别任务对隐私约束的不同敏感性。

Method: 采用Kleinberg和Mullainathan提出的极限语言生成模型，在连续发布框架下设计差分隐私算法。通过理论分析比较可数语言集合与有限语言集合的生成复杂度，研究识别任务中隐私带来的根本性障碍，并区分对抗性设置与随机性设置下的不同结果。

Result: 1. 对于可数语言集合，差分隐私不产生定性成本：存在ε-差分隐私算法可在极限中生成任何可数集合；2. 隐私产生定量成本：存在大小为k的有限集合，均匀隐私生成需要Ω(k/ε)样本，而非隐私下仅需1个样本；3. 识别任务中隐私造成根本性障碍：无ε-DP算法能识别包含两个具有无限交集和有限集合差的语言集合；4. 随机性设置下，隐私识别仅在对抗性模型中可识别时才可能。

Conclusion: 隐私约束在语言生成与识别任务中产生不同影响：生成任务中隐私仅增加定量成本而不影响定性能力，而识别任务中隐私引入根本性障碍。研究揭示了生成与识别之间的新维度差异，以及隐私约束导致的对抗性与随机性设置之间的分离。

Abstract: We initiate the study of language generation in the limit, a model recently introduced by Kleinberg and Mullainathan [KM24], under the constraint of differential privacy. We consider the continual release model, where a generator must eventually output a stream of valid strings while protecting the privacy of the entire input sequence. Our first main result is that for countable collections of languages, privacy comes at no qualitative cost: we provide an $\varepsilon$-differentially-private algorithm that generates in the limit from any countable collection. This stands in contrast to many learning settings where privacy renders learnability impossible. However, privacy does impose a quantitative cost: there are finite collections of size $k$ for which uniform private generation requires $Ω(k/\varepsilon)$ samples, whereas just one sample suffices non-privately.
  We then turn to the harder problem of language identification in the limit. Here, we show that privacy creates fundamental barriers. We prove that no $\varepsilon$-DP algorithm can identify a collection containing two languages with an infinite intersection and a finite set difference, a condition far stronger than the classical non-private characterization of identification. Next, we turn to the stochastic setting where the sample strings are sampled i.i.d. from a distribution (instead of being generated by an adversary). Here, we show that private identification is possible if and only if the collection is identifiable in the adversarial model. Together, our results establish new dimensions along which generation and identification differ and, for identification, a separation between adversarial and stochastic settings induced by privacy constraints.

</details>


### [500] [Intensity Dot Product Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07810)
*Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva,Matteo Dalla Riva*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)，将随机点积图扩展为使用泊松点过程生成潜在位置，实现随机节点数量并保持几何可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在位置随机图模型通常固定节点集，而图元模型允许更多随机性但几何解释性较弱。需要一种既能保持随机点积图的几何可解释性，又能引入节点随机性的模型。

Method: 引入Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)，用欧几里得潜在空间上的泊松点过程替代固定潜在位置集合，通过强度函数连接连续潜在结构与有限观测图。

Result: 定义了热图和期望算子作为概率矩阵的连续类比，证明了邻接矩阵奇异值与算子谱之间的谱一致性，展示了与图元表示的关系，以及经典RDPG在集中极限下的出现。

Conclusion: IDPGs提供了兼具几何可解释性和节点随机性的统一框架，其强度参数化特性自然支持通过偏微分方程进行时间扩展，为动态图建模开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Latent-position random graph models usually treat the node set as fixed once the sample size is chosen, while graphon-based and random-measure constructions allow more randomness at the cost of weaker geometric interpretability. We introduce \emph{Intensity Dot Product Graphs} (IDPGs), which extend Random Dot Product Graphs by replacing a fixed collection of latent positions with a Poisson point process on a Euclidean latent space. This yields a model with random node populations, RDPG-style dot-product affinities, and a population-level intensity that links continuous latent structure to finite observed graphs. We define the heat map and the desire operator as continuous analogues of the probability matrix, prove a spectral consistency result connecting adjacency singular values to the operator spectrum, compare the construction with graphon and digraphon representations, and show how classical RDPGs arise in a concentrated limit. Because the model is parameterized by an evolving intensity, temporal extensions through partial differential equations arise naturally.

</details>


### [501] [Order-Optimal Sequential 1-Bit Mean Estimation in General Tail Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07796)
*Ivan Lau,Jonathan Scarlett*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出基于随机阈值查询的自适应1比特均值估计器，在任意k阶矩有界分布上达到最优样本复杂度，揭示了1比特量化在方差有限情况下的固有惩罚和自适应与非自适应方法间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在严格1比特通信约束下的均值估计问题，旨在设计样本复杂度最优的自适应估计器，同时探索1比特量化的基本极限和自适应性的价值。

Method: 提出基于随机阈值查询的自适应均值估计器，通过顺序选择阈值并观察样本是否超过阈值来获取1比特信息，算法可适应未知采样预算和尺度参数，并提供仅需两阶段自适应的变体。

Result: 对于任意k>1阶矩有界的分布，估计器达到(ε,δ)-PAC保证且样本复杂度在所有尾部机制下都是阶最优的；对于k≠2匹配未量化下界加定位成本，对于k=2存在额外对数惩罚并证明这是1比特量化的基本极限；揭示了自适应与非自适应方法间的显著差距。

Conclusion: 自适应1比特均值估计在严格通信约束下可实现接近最优性能，但方差有限情况下存在固有的对数惩罚；自适应方法相比非自适应方法在样本效率上有显著优势；算法设计可适应实际约束如未知预算和参数。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of mean estimation under strict 1-bit communication constraints. We propose a novel adaptive mean estimator based solely on randomized threshold queries, where each 1-bit outcome indicates whether a given sample exceeds a sequentially chosen threshold. Our estimator is $(ε, δ)$-PAC for any distribution with a bounded mean $μ\in [-λ, λ]$ and a bounded $k$-th central moment $\mathbb{E}[|X-μ|^k] \le σ^k$ for any fixed $k > 1$. Crucially, our sample complexity is order-optimal in all such tail regimes, i.e., for every such $k$ value. For $k \neq 2$, our estimator's sample complexity matches the unquantized minimax lower bounds plus an unavoidable $O(\log(λ/σ))$ localization cost. For the finite-variance case ($k=2$), our estimator's sample complexity has an extra multiplicative $O(\log(σ/ε))$ penalty, and we establish a novel information-theoretic lower bound showing that this penalty is a fundamental limit of 1-bit quantization. We also establish a significant adaptivity gap: for both threshold queries and more general interval queries, the sample complexity of any non-adaptive estimator must scale linearly with the search space parameter $λ/σ$, rendering it vastly less sample efficient than our adaptive approach. Finally, we present algorithmic variants that (i) handle an unknown sampling budget, (ii) adapt to an unknown scale parameter~$σ$ given (possibly loose) bounds, and (iii) require only two stages of adaptivity at the expense of more complicated general 1-bit queries.

</details>


### [502] [Sparse $ε$ insensitive zone bounded asymmetric elastic net support vector machines for pattern classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07748)
*Haiyan Du,Hu Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出ε-BAEN-SVM：结合弹性网损失与鲁棒损失框架，构建稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，实现稀疏且鲁棒的SVM模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SVM模型对噪声敏感且缺乏稀疏性，限制了其性能表现。需要同时解决稀疏性和鲁棒性问题

Method: 构建稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失函数，结合SVM框架；设计基于裁剪对偶坐标下降的半二次算法，将非凸优化问题转化为加权子问题序列

Result: ε-BAEN-SVM在模拟和真实数据集上优于传统和现有鲁棒SVM；在高斯核下获得更好精度和噪声不敏感性；统计检验证实其优越性

Conclusion: ε-BAEN-SVM在噪声环境中良好平衡稀疏性和鲁棒性，具有理论保证和实践价值

Abstract: Existing support vector machines(SVM) models are sensitive to noise and lack sparsity, which limits their performance. To address these issues, we combine the elastic net loss with a robust loss framework to construct a sparse $\varepsilon$-insensitive bounded asymmetric elastic net loss, and integrate it with SVM to build $\varepsilon$ Insensitive Zone Bounded Asymmetric Elastic Net Loss-based SVM($\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM). $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM is both sparse and robust. Sparsity is proven by showing that samples inside the $\varepsilon$-insensitive band are not support vectors. Robustness is theoretically guaranteed because the influence function is bounded. To solve the non-convex optimization problem, we design a half-quadratic algorithm based on clipping dual coordinate descent. It transforms the problem into a series of weighted subproblems, improving computational efficiency via the $\varepsilon$ parameter. Experiments on simulated and real datasets show that $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM outperforms traditional and existing robust SVMs. It balances sparsity and robustness well in noisy environments. Statistical tests confirm its superiority. Under the Gaussian kernel, it achieves better accuracy and noise insensitivity, validating its effectiveness and practical value.

</details>


### [503] [The Condition-Number Principle for Prototype Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07744)
*Romano Li,Jianfei Cao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出几何框架连接聚类目标精度与结构恢复，定义聚类条件数，证明小目标值间隙对应小分类误差，揭示鲁棒性与簇不平衡敏感性的权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立原型聚类中目标函数精度与结构恢复之间的理论联系，为解释低目标函数值作为有意义聚类结构的可靠证据提供几何原理

Method: 开发算法无关的几何框架，定义聚类条件数（比较簇内尺度与跨越簇边界所需的最小损失增加），分析可容许损失函数类，建立确定性非渐近保证

Result: 当聚类条件数较小时，任何具有小次优间隙的解相对于基准划分的分类误差也小；误差集中在簇边界附近；在增强局部边界条件下，足够深的簇核心能被精确恢复；揭示了鲁棒性与簇不平衡敏感性的权衡导致尖锐相变

Conclusion: 该框架为解释低目标函数值作为有意义聚类结构的可靠证据提供了几何原理，分离了算法精度与实例固有几何难度的作用，建立了目标精度与结构恢复之间的理论联系

Abstract: We develop a geometric framework that links objective accuracy to structural recovery in prototype-based clustering. The analysis is algorithm-agnostic and applies to a broad class of admissible loss functions. We define a clustering condition number that compares within-cluster scale to the minimum loss increase required to move a point across a cluster boundary. When this quantity is small, any solution with a small suboptimality gap must also have a small misclassification error relative to a benchmark partition. The framework also clarifies a fundamental trade-off between robustness and sensitivity to cluster imbalance, leading to sharp phase transitions for exact recovery under different objectives. The guarantees are deterministic and non-asymptotic, and they separate the role of algorithmic accuracy from the intrinsic geometric difficulty of the instance. We further show that errors concentrate near cluster boundaries and that sufficiently deep cluster cores are recovered exactly under strengthened local margins. Together, these results provide a geometric principle for interpreting low objective values as reliable evidence of meaningful clustering structure.

</details>


### [504] [On the Unique Recovery of Transport Maps and Vector Fields from Finite Measure-Valued Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07671)
*Jonah Botvinick-Greenhouse,Yunan Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文建立了从有限测度值数据中唯一恢复向量场和传输映射的理论保证，为生成模型、数据驱动动力系统和PDE反问题提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何从有限数量的密度数据中唯一识别微分同胚和向量场，解决生成模型、动力系统识别和偏微分方程反问题中的基本理论问题。

Method: 利用Whitney和Takens嵌入定理，分析微分同胚通过有限个推前密度作用的唯一可识别性条件，建立基于概率测度空间中推前密度差异的新度量，并扩展到向量场的无穷小识别。

Result: 证明了微分同胚可以从有限个推前密度对{(ρ_j,f_#ρ_j)}中唯一确定的条件，建立了向量场从加权散度观测{(ρ_j,div(ρ_j v))}中唯一识别的类似结果，所需密度数量m仅依赖于问题的内在维度。

Conclusion: 该研究为从有限数据中唯一恢复传输映射和向量场提供了严格的理论基础，建立了与Perron-Frobenius和Koopman算子的联系，并展示了在连续性、平流、Fokker-Planck和平流-扩散-反应方程等PDE反问题中的良好适定性保证。

Abstract: We establish guarantees for the unique recovery of vector fields and transport maps from finite measure-valued data, yielding new insights into generative models, data-driven dynamical systems, and PDE inverse problems. In particular, we provide general conditions under which a diffeomorphism can be uniquely identified from its pushforward action on finitely many densities, i.e., when the data $\{(ρ_j,f_\#ρ_j)\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $f$. As a corollary, we introduce a new metric which compares diffeomorphisms by measuring the discrepancy between finitely many pushforward densities in the space of probability measures. We also prove analogous results in an infinitesimal setting, where derivatives of the densities along a smooth vector field are observed, i.e., when $\{(ρ_j,\text{div} (ρ_j v))\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $v$. Our analysis makes use of the Whitney and Takens embedding theorems, which provide estimates on the required number of densities $m$, depending only on the intrinsic dimension of the problem. We additionally interpret our results through the lens of Perron--Frobenius and Koopman operators and demonstrate how our techniques lead to new guarantees for the well-posedness of certain PDE inverse problems related to continuity, advection, Fokker--Planck, and advection-diffusion-reaction equations. Finally, we present illustrative numerical experiments demonstrating the unique identification of transport maps from finitely many pushforward densities, and of vector fields from finitely many weighted divergence observations.

</details>


### [505] [Variational Approximated Restricted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Spatial Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07635)
*Debjoy Thakur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出VREML框架，通过变分近似解决空间数据ICAR模型中的大规模计算问题，理论证明变分族在Gaussian ICAR设置下精确，实证显示优于MLE和INLA


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统REML方法需要反复求逆和分解大规模稀疏精度矩阵，计算成本高昂，需要开发可扩展的推理方法

Method: 提出变分限制最大似然(VREML)框架，使用高斯变分分布近似难处理的边际似然，构建证据下界(ELBO)，开发坐标上升算法联合估计空间随机效应和方差分量

Result: 理论证明ELBO单调收敛，变分族在Gaussian ICAR设置下精确（后验层面近似误差为零），实证显示VREML优于MLE和INLA

Conclusion: VREML为空间ICAR模型提供了计算高效且理论上精确的推理框架，解决了大规模计算瓶颈

Abstract: This research considers a scalable inference for spatial data modeled through Gaussian intrinsic conditional autoregressive (ICAR) structures. The classical estimation method, restricted maximum likelihood (REML), requires repeated inversion and factorization of large, sparse precision matrices, which makes this computation costly. To sort this problem out, we propose a variational restricted maximum likelihood (VREML) framework that approximates the intractable marginal likelihood using a Gaussian variational distribution. By constructing an evidence lower bound (ELBO) on the restricted likelihood, we derive a computationally efficient coordinate-ascent algorithm for jointly estimating the spatial random effects and variance components. In this article, we theoretically establish the monotone convergence of ELBO and mathematically exhibit that the variational family is exact under Gaussian ICAR settings, which is an indication of nullifying approximation error at the posterior level. We empirically establish the supremacy of our VREML over MLE and INLA.

</details>


### [506] [Gaussian Approximation for Asynchronous Q-learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07323)
*Artemy Rubtsov,Sergey Samsonov,Vladimir Ulyanov,Alexey Naumov*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文推导了异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代在高维中心极限定理下的收敛速率，使用多项式步长k^{-ω}，ω∈(1/2,1]，在状态-动作-下一状态三元组形成均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链的假设下，获得了超矩形类上高达n^{-1/6}log⁴(nSA)的收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代的高维中心极限定理收敛速率，为强化学习算法的理论分析提供更精确的收敛性保证，特别是在高维状态-动作空间下的统计性质。

Method: 采用多项式步长k^{-ω}的异步Q学习算法，假设状态-动作-下一状态三元组序列形成均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链。通过证明一个关于鞅差和的高维中心极限定理作为关键技术工具，分析Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代的收敛行为。

Result: 在超矩形类上获得了高达n^{-1/6}log⁴(nSA)的收敛速率，其中n是算法使用的样本数，S和A分别是状态和动作的数量。同时给出了算法最后迭代的高阶矩界限。

Conclusion: 该论文为异步Q学习算法的Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代建立了高维中心极限定理收敛速率，证明的技术工具（鞅差和的高维中心极限定理）具有独立的理论价值，为强化学习算法的统计推断提供了理论基础。

Abstract: In this paper, we derive rates of convergence in the high-dimensional central limit theorem for Polyak-Ruppert averaged iterates generated by the asynchronous Q-learning algorithm with a polynomial stepsize $k^{-ω},\, ω\in (1/2, 1]$. Assuming that the sequence of state-action-next-state triples $(s_k, a_k, s_{k+1})_{k \geq 0}$ forms a uniformly geometrically ergodic Markov chain, we establish a rate of order up to $n^{-1/6} \log^{4} (nS A)$ over the class of hyper-rectangles, where $n$ is the number of samples used by the algorithm and $S$ and $A$ denote the numbers of states and actions, respectively. To obtain this result, we prove a high-dimensional central limit theorem for sums of martingale differences, which may be of independent interest. Finally, we present bounds for high-order moments for the algorithm's last iterate.

</details>


### [507] [The Theory and Practice of Highly Scalable Gaussian Process Regression with Nearest Neighbours](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07267)
*Robert Allison,Tomasz Maciazek,Anthony Stephenson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文为最近邻高斯过程（NNGP/GPnn）回归建立了完整的理论框架，证明了其统计一致性、收敛速率和超参数鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程回归在训练规模上具有立方复杂度，限制了其在大规模数据集上的应用。NNGP/GPnn方法通过仅使用每个测试点的最近邻进行预测，在实践中表现出色，但缺乏完整的理论支撑。

Method: 建立NNGP/GPnn回归的理论分析框架，在温和的正则性假设下，推导三个关键预测指标（MSE、CAL、NLL）的几乎必然点态极限，研究L2风险，证明普遍一致性，并分析超参数敏感性。

Result: 证明了NNGP/GPnn的L2风险达到Stone的最小最大速率n^{-2α/(2p+d)}，其中α和p表征回归问题的正则性。证明了MSE在紧超参数集上的一致收敛性，以及其关于长度尺度、核尺度和噪声方差的导数渐近消失，并给出了显式速率。

Conclusion: 该研究为NNGP/GPnn作为高度可扩展且理论严谨的高斯过程替代方法提供了坚实的统计基础，解释了其超参数调优的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Gaussian process ($GP$) regression is a widely used non-parametric modeling tool, but its cubic complexity in the training size limits its use on massive data sets. A practical remedy is to predict using only the nearest neighbours of each test point, as in Nearest Neighbour Gaussian Process ($NNGP$) regression for geospatial problems and the related scalable $GPnn$ method for more general machine-learning applications. Despite their strong empirical performance, the large-$n$ theory of $NNGP/GPnn$ remains incomplete. We develop a theoretical framework for $NNGP$ and $GPnn$ regression. Under mild regularity assumptions, we derive almost sure pointwise limits for three key predictive criteria: mean squared error ($MSE$), calibration coefficient ($CAL$), and negative log-likelihood ($NLL$). We then study the $L_2$-risk, prove universal consistency, and show that the risk attains Stone's minimax rate $n^{-2α/(2p+d)}$, where $α$ and $p$ capture regularity of the regression problem. We also prove uniform convergence of $MSE$ over compact hyper-parameter sets and show that its derivatives with respect to lengthscale, kernel scale, and noise variance vanish asymptotically, with explicit rates. This explains the observed robustness of $GPnn$ to hyper-parameter tuning. These results provide a rigorous statistical foundation for $NNGP/GPnn$ as a highly scalable and principled alternative to full $GP$ models.

</details>


### [508] [Amortized Filtering and Smoothing with Conditional Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07169)
*Tiangang Cui,Xiaodong Feng,Chenlong Pei,Xiaoliang Wan,Tao Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: AFSF：基于条件归一化流的统一摊销框架，用于高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑是科学和工程领域的基础但具有挑战性的问题，需要开发能够处理复杂时间序列的有效方法

Method: 使用循环编码器将观测历史映射到固定维度的摘要统计量，基于该共享表示学习前向流（滤波分布）和后向流（后向转移核），通过标准后向递归恢复整个轨迹的平滑分布

Result: AFSF能够准确近似滤波分布和平滑路径，支持超出训练范围的预测，并通过共享摘要统计量实现隐式正则化，改进轨迹级平滑

Conclusion: AFSF为高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑提供了一个统一、有效的摊销框架，具有准确性和可扩展性优势

Abstract: Bayesian filtering and smoothing for high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems are fundamental yet challenging problems in many areas of science and engineering. In this work, we propose AFSF, a unified amortized framework for filtering and smoothing with conditional normalizing flows. The core idea is to encode each observation history into a fixed-dimensional summary statistic and use this shared representation to learn both a forward flow for the filtering distribution and a backward flow for the backward transition kernel. Specifically, a recurrent encoder maps each observation history to a fixed-dimensional summary statistic whose dimension does not depend on the length of the time series. Conditioned on this shared summary statistic, the forward flow approximates the filtering distribution, while the backward flow approximates the backward transition kernel. The smoothing distribution over an entire trajectory is then recovered by combining the terminal filtering distribution with the learned backward flow through the standard backward recursion. By learning the underlying temporal evolution structure, AFSF also supports extrapolation beyond the training horizon. Moreover, by coupling the two flows through shared summary statistics, AFSF induces an implicit regularization across latent state trajectories and improves trajectory-level smoothing. In addition, we develop a flow-based particle filtering variant that provides an alternative filtering procedure and enables ESS-based diagnostics when explicit model factors are available. Numerical experiments demonstrate that AFSF provides accurate approximations of both filtering distributions and smoothing paths.

</details>


### [509] [A Data-Informed Variational Clustering Framework for Noisy High-Dimensional Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06864)
*Wan Ping Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: DIVI是一种数据驱动的变分聚类框架，针对高维噪声数据，结合全局特征门控和基于分裂的自适应结构增长，实现稳定的聚类、特征相关性学习和模型复杂度自适应调整。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维噪声环境下，当只有少量维度具有信息性且聚类数量未知时，传统的基于似然的方法容易变得不稳定或对噪声维度过度敏感。分区恢复、特征相关性学习和结构自适应这三个任务紧密耦合，需要一种更稳健的解决方案。

Method: DIVI框架结合了全局特征门控和基于分裂的自适应结构增长。它使用信息性先验初始化来稳定优化，以可微分方式学习特征相关性，并仅在局部诊断显示欠拟合时才扩展模型复杂度。该方法还考虑了运行时可扩展性和参数敏感性。

Result: DIVI在严重特征噪声下表现出竞争力，保持计算可行性，产生可解释的特征门控行为，同时在挑战性设置中表现出保守增长和可识别的失败机制。框架在聚类性能、计算效率和可解释性方面均表现良好。

Conclusion: DIVI最好被视为针对噪声高维数据的实用变分聚类框架，而不是完全贝叶斯生成解决方案。它在处理高维噪声数据时提供了稳定、可解释且计算可行的聚类方法。

Abstract: Clustering in high-dimensional settings with severe feature noise remains challenging, especially when only a small subset of dimensions is informative and the final number of clusters is not specified in advance. In such regimes, partition recovery, feature relevance learning, and structural adaptation are tightly coupled, and standard likelihood-based methods can become unstable or overly sensitive to noisy dimensions. We propose DIVI, a data-informed variational clustering framework that combines global feature gating with split-based adaptive structure growth. DIVI uses informative prior initialization to stabilize optimization, learns feature relevance in a differentiable manner, and expands model complexity only when local diagnostics indicate underfit. Beyond clustering performance, we also examine runtime scalability and parameter sensitivity in order to clarify the computational and practical behavior of the framework. Empirically, we find that DIVI performs competitively under severe feature noise, remains computationally feasible, and yields interpretable feature-gating behavior, while also exhibiting conservative growth and identifiable failure regimes in challenging settings. Overall, DIVI is best viewed as a practical variational clustering framework for noisy high-dimensional data rather than as a fully Bayesian generative solution.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [510] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性矢量仅沿特定体坐标系方向测量的部分观测场景，通过改进创新项实现几乎全局渐近稳定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决姿态估计中惯性矢量仅被部分观测的问题，即只能测量矢量沿特定体坐标系方向的分量（标量测量），这种场景出现在不完全矢量测量或异构传感器信息约束中

Method: 在SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器基础上，提出针对标量输出结构的改进创新项观测器，要求至少三个惯性矢量沿共同体坐标系向量测量，并推导了两种标量配置的收敛条件

Result: 在适当的持续激励条件下，当至少三个惯性矢量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，可实现几乎全局渐近稳定性；对于两种标量配置，推导了保证收敛的充分条件，数值结果验证了方法的有效性

Conclusion: 提出的标量基互补滤波器能够有效处理姿态估计中的部分观测问题，适用于传感受限或新型传感模式下的挑战性场景，扩展了传统姿态估计方法的适用范围

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [511] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过非交易性信用记录智能体历史合作行为，在有限通信下实现冲突解决和长期公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器虽然能保证解的最优性，但指数级计算复杂度限制了其在大规模系统和实时应用中的可扩展性；现有的去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但会导致次优结果和高成本差异。因此需要一种既能保持效率又能促进公平的去中心化协调框架。

Method: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架，Karma是一种人工的、不可交易的信用，用于记录智能体的历史合作行为并调节未来的冲突解决决策。将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，使智能体能够通过成对重新规划解决冲突，在有限通信和无全局优先级结构的情况下促进长期公平性。

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取货-送货场景中评估该机制。结果表明，Karma机制能够平衡智能体间的重新规划工作量，在不牺牲整体效率的情况下减少服务时间的差异。

Conclusion: Karma机制为多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的去中心化协调方法，能够在有限通信条件下实现冲突解决，同时促进智能体间的长期公平性，平衡了效率与公平的权衡。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


### [512] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: MVP冲突解决算法在eVTOL运行中能耗极低，中位数能耗开销低于1.5%，但分布右偏，尾部情况可达44%开销。开发了机器学习模型预测能耗开销及不确定性边界，支持运营规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高密度城市空域中eVTOL飞机需要通过战术冲突解决保持安全间隔，但此类机动带来的能量成本尚未得到系统量化。研究MVP算法下的冲突解决机动如何影响eVTOL能耗。

Method: 使用集成在交通仿真中的基于物理的功率模型，分析一个扇区内约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度。开发机器学习模型在任务开始时估计能耗开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP去冲突是能量高效的：所有密度水平下中位数能耗开销保持在1.5%以下，扇区内大多数航路飞行产生可忽略的惩罚。但分布呈现显著右偏，最高密度下尾部情况达到44%开销。95百分位范围为3.84%至5.3%，表明4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术去冲突场景。

Conclusion: 结果验证了MVP对能量受限eVTOL运行的适用性，为先进空中交通中的储备能量确定提供了量化指导。机器学习模型的不确定性边界保守，实际结果落在预测范围内的频率高于声明的置信水平，适合安全关键的储备规划。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [513] [Synchronous Observer Design for Landmark-Inertial SLAM with Magnetometer and Intermittent GNSS Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05156)
*Arkadeep Saha,Pieter van Goor,Ravi Banavar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种非线性观测器用于地标-惯性SLAM，通过间歇性GNSS位置和磁力计测量克服可观测性限制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地标-惯性SLAM中，机器人在惯性坐标系中的位置、地标位置以及机器人偏航角不可观测，需要解决这一限制

Method: 设计非线性观测器，结合间歇性GNSS位置测量和磁力计测量来增强系统可观测性

Result: 所提观测器的全状态误差动态被证明是几乎全局渐近稳定和局部指数稳定的，并通过仿真验证

Conclusion: 通过添加GNSS和磁力计测量，成功克服了地标-惯性SLAM的可观测性限制，实现了稳定的状态估计

Abstract: In Landmark-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (LI-SLAM), the positions of landmarks in the environment and the robot's pose relative to these landmarks are estimated using landmark position measurements, and measurements from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). However, the robot and landmark positions in the inertial frame, and the yaw of the robot, are not observable in LI-SLAM. This paper proposes a nonlinear observer for LI-SLAM that overcomes the observability constraints with the addition of intermittent GNSS position and magnetometer measurements. The full-state error dynamics of the proposed observer is shown to be both almost-globally asymptotically stable and locally exponentially stable, and this is validated using simulations.

</details>


### [514] [Differentiable Invariant Sets for Hybrid Limit Cycles with Application to Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05108)
*Varun Madabushi,Akash Harapanahalli,Samuel Coogan,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 将参数化嵌入方法扩展到混合系统，用于计算双足机器人简化模型名义轨迹周围的向前不变集，并通过双层优化框架设计最大化不变集大小的跟踪控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于表现出周期性行为的混合系统，分析包含极限环的不变集是研究闭环系统鲁棒性的自然方法。然而，计算这些集合计算成本高昂，特别是在应用于接触丰富的信息物理系统（如腿式机器人）时。

Method: 采用三步方法：(1) 计算名义连续流周围的过近似可达集；(2) 记录与守卫表面的交点；(3) 将这些交点通过重置映射传递。如果一步后的过近似可达集是初始集的严格子集，则正式验证该混合周期轨道的向前不变集。使用基于JAX的参数化可达集计算库immrax进行数值验证，并在双层优化框架中设计最大化不变集大小的跟踪控制器。

Result: 在双足步行者模型上数值验证了不变集条件，并成功设计了能够最大化不变集大小的跟踪控制器。

Conclusion: 该方法将连续系统的参数化嵌入过近似可达集方法扩展到混合系统，能够有效计算周期轨道周围的向前不变集，并通过优化框架设计鲁棒控制器，为接触丰富的信息物理系统提供了形式化验证工具。

Abstract: For hybrid systems exhibiting periodic behavior, analyzing the invariant set containing the limit cycle is a natural way to study the robustness of the closed-loop system. However, computing these sets can be computationally expensive, especially when applied to contact-rich cyber-physical systems such as legged robots. In this work, we extend existing methods for overapproximating reachable sets of continuous systems using parametric embeddings to compute a forward-invariant set around the nominal trajectory of a simplified model of a bipedal robot. Our three-step approach (i) computes an overapproximating reachable set around the nominal continuous flow, (ii) catalogs intersections with the guard surface, and (iii) passes these intersections through the reset map. If the overapproximated reachable set after one step is a strict subset of the initial set, we formally verify a forward invariant set for this hybrid periodic orbit. We verify this condition on the bipedal walker model numerically using immrax, a JAX-based library for parametric reachable set computation, and use it within a bi-level optimization framework to design a tracking controller that maximizes the size of the invariant set.

</details>


### [515] [Finite-Step Invariant Sets for Hybrid Systems with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05102)
*Varun Madabushi,Elizabeth Dietrich,Hanna Krasowski,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于采样优化的算法框架，用于计算混合动力系统周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球，并提供概率保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Poincaré返回映射是分析混合动力系统周期轨道的基本工具，但计算不变集在计算上很困难，特别是当系统动力学只能通过前向模拟获得时。需要一种方法来评估对扰动的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出基于采样优化的算法框架，利用返回映射的采样评估来计算名义周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球。该方法提供满足用户定义精度阈值的有限步不变性的概率保证。

Result: 在两个低维系统和一个指南针步态行走模型上验证了该方法，能够有效计算有限步不变椭球并伴随概率保证。

Conclusion: 该算法框架为混合动力系统周期轨道的鲁棒性分析提供了一种实用的计算方法，特别适用于只能通过模拟获得系统动力学的情况，具有概率保证的特性。

Abstract: Poincare return maps are a fundamental tool for analyzing periodic orbits in hybrid dynamical systems, including legged locomotion, power electronics, and other cyber-physical systems with switching behavior. The Poincare return map captures the evolution of the hybrid system on a guard surface, reducing the stability analysis of a periodic orbit to that of a discrete-time system. While linearization provides local stability information, assessing robustness to disturbances requires identifying invariant sets of the state space under the return dynamics. However, computing such invariant sets is computationally difficult, especially when system dynamics are only available through forward simulation. In this work, we propose an algorithmic framework leveraging sampling-based optimization to compute a finite-step invariant ellipsoid around a nominal periodic orbit using sampled evaluations of the return map. The resulting solution is accompanied by probabilistic guarantees on finite-step invariance satisfying a user-defined accuracy threshold. We demonstrate the approach on two low-dimensional systems and a compass-gait walking model.

</details>


### [516] [Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles for Whole-Facility Data Center Infrastructure Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07345)
*Roberto Vercellino,Jared Willard,Gustavo Campos,Weslley da Silva Pereira,Olivia Hull,Matthew Selensky,Juliane Mueller*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种将AI工作负载高分辨率功耗测量与数据中心整体能耗需求关联的方法，通过NLR数据中心H100 GPU测量AI训练、微调和推理的0.1秒分辨率功耗，使用标准化基准测试，并公开数据集，通过自底向上事件驱动模型扩展到设施级能耗分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI快速发展导致数据中心能耗急剧增加，但现有功耗数据多为专有且分辨率不一，难以准确估算设施级能耗和规划基础设施。

Method: 在NLR高性能计算数据中心使用NVIDIA H100 GPU，以0.1秒分辨率测量AI训练、微调和推理工作负载的功耗；使用MLCommons基准进行训练和微调，vLLM基准进行推理；采用自底向上、事件驱动的数据中心能耗模型将工作负载功耗扩展到设施级。

Result: 获得了AI工作负载的高分辨率功耗数据集并公开；生成了捕获AI工作负载和用户行为驱动的真实时间波动的设施级能耗曲线；该方法可为电网连接、现场发电和分布式微电网等基础设施规划提供依据。

Conclusion: 该方法填补了高分辨率工作负载功耗测量与设施级能耗需求之间的空白，提供了可重复、标准化的能耗分析框架，有助于更准确地规划AI数据中心基础设施。

Abstract: The rapid growth of generative artificial intelligence (AI) has introduced unprecedented computational demands, driving significant increases in the energy footprint of data centers. However, existing power consumption data is largely proprietary and reported at varying resolutions, creating challenges for estimating whole-facility energy use and planning infrastructure. In this work, we present a methodology that bridges this gap by linking high-resolution workload power measurements to whole-facility energy demand. Using NLR's high-performance computing data center equipped with NVIDIA H100 GPUs, we measure power consumption of AI workloads at 0.1-second resolution for AI training, fine-tuning and inference jobs. Workloads are characterized using MLCommons benchmarks for model training and fine-tuning, and vLLM benchmarks for inference, enabling reproducible and standardized workload profiling. The dataset of power consumption profiles is made publicly available. These power profiles are then scaled to the whole-facility-level using a bottom-up, event-driven, data center energy model. The resulting whole-facility energy profiles capture realistic temporal fluctuations driven by AI workloads and user-behavior, and can be used to inform infrastructure planning for grid connection, on-site energy generation, and distributed microgrids.

</details>


### [517] [Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor for Constrained Attitude Control on SO(3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04041)
*Satoshi Nakano,Masahiro Suzuki,Misa Ohashi,Noboru Chikami,Shusuke Otabe*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种周期事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG），用于SO(3)群上的刚体姿态控制，避免奇异性和满足输入饱和及几何指向约束，无需在线优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决刚体姿态控制中的约束问题：1）避免欧拉角等参数化带来的奇异性；2）在SO(3)群上直接处理姿态控制；3）同时满足输入饱和和几何指向约束；4）避免依赖在线优化方法。

Method: 提出周期事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG）：1）在SO(3)群上直接设计控制器；2）采用周期性事件触发监督更新机制，仅在采样时刻满足鲁棒安全条件时更新辅助参考；3）避免连续时间参考更新；4）在流形上对级联系统进行严格的稳定性分析。

Result: 1）严格证明了闭环系统对几乎所有初始配置的渐近稳定性和指数收敛性；2）数值仿真验证了控制架构的有效性；3）展示了约束满足性和收敛特性。

Conclusion: 提出的PET-ERG方法成功解决了SO(3)群上的约束姿态控制问题，通过周期性事件触发机制实现了无奇异性、满足约束且无需在线优化的控制方案，具有严格的稳定性保证。

Abstract: This letter addresses the constrained attitude control problem for rigid bodies directly on the special orthogonal group SO(3), avoiding singularities associated with parameterizations such as Euler angles. We propose a novel Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor (PET-ERG) that enforces input saturation and geometric pointing constraints without relying on online optimization. A key feature is a periodic event-triggered supervisory update: the auxiliary reference is updated only at sampled instants when a robust safety condition is met, thereby avoiding continuous-time reference updates and enabling a rigorous stability analysis of the cascade system on the manifold. Through this structured approach, we rigorously establish the asymptotic stability and exponential convergence of the closed-loop system for almost all initial configurations. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed control architecture and demonstrate constraint satisfaction and convergence properties.

</details>


### [518] [Element-based Formation Control: a Unified Perspective from Continuum Mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04027)
*Kun Cao,Lihua Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于连续介质力学变形梯度概念的编队控制统一框架，将编队建模为由单纯形元素组成的离散弹性体，通过定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量，推导出能强制执行平移、旋转、缩放和仿射变换等几何不变性的分布式控制律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统编队控制方法通常基于图边定义的几何约束，缺乏统一的理论框架。本文旨在建立连接现有刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法的桥梁，通过引入连续介质力学概念提供更通用的编队控制方法。

Method: 引入连续介质力学中的变形梯度概念，将编队建模为离散弹性体，由单纯形元素组成。定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量，推导出分布式控制律家族。详细分析收敛性和控制器特性，建立与现有方法的数学等价关系。

Result: 理论证明所提框架可作为刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法的桥梁：刚性基控制器在数学上等价于最小化变形能量张量的特定投影；建立了能量最小化与拉普拉斯基编队控制的严格联系。2D和3D数值仿真验证了框架的有效性和统一性。

Conclusion: 基于变形梯度的元素框架为编队控制提供了统一的理论基础，能够强制执行多种几何不变性，并建立了现有主要方法之间的数学联系，为编队控制理论发展提供了新的视角。

Abstract: This paper establishes a unified element-based framework for formation control by introducing the concept of the deformation gradient from continuum mechanics. Unlike traditional methods that rely on geometric constraints defined on graph edges, we model the formation as a discrete elastic body composed of simplicial elements. By defining a generalized distortion energy based on the local deformation gradient tensor, we derive a family of distributed control laws that can enforce various geometric invariances, including translation, rotation, scaling, and affine transformations. The convergence properties and the features of the proposed controllers are analyzed in detail. Theoretically, we show that the proposed framework serves as a bridge between existing rigidity-based and Laplacian-based approaches. Specifically, we show that rigidity-based controllers are mathematically equivalent to minimizing specific projections of the deformation energy tensor. Furthermore, we establish a rigorous link between the proposed energy minimization and Laplacian-based formation control. Numerical simulations in 2D and 3D validate the effectiveness and the unified nature of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [519] [Risk-Constrained Belief-Space Optimization for Safe Control under Latent Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03868)
*Clinton Enwerem,John S. Baras,Calin Belta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种风险敏感的信度空间MPPI控制框架，通过CVaR约束在潜在参数不确定性下保证轨迹安全，在物理仿真中相比风险中性方法显著提升成功率并避免接触违规。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多安全关键控制系统必须在传感器无法直接解析的潜在不确定性下运行。这种不确定性来自未知物理特性、外部扰动或未观测环境几何，影响动力学、任务可行性和安全裕度。标准方法优化期望性能但对罕见严重结果保护有限，而鲁棒方法保守处理不确定性而未利用其概率结构。

Method: 考虑部分观测动态系统，其动力学、成本和安全性约束依赖于作为信度分布维护的潜在参数，提出风险敏感的信度空间模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制框架。该框架在信度下规划，同时对滚动时域内的轨迹安全裕度施加条件风险价值（CVaR）约束。控制器优化风险正则化性能目标，同时显式约束由潜在参数变异性引起的安全违规尾部风险。

Result: 建立了风险约束控制器的三个性质：(1) CVaR约束蕴含概率安全保证；(2) 当目标中风险权重趋于零时，控制器恢复风险中性最优；(3) 通过并集界论证将每时域保证扩展到重复求解的累积安全性。在物理仿真中，针对视觉引导灵巧存储任务（抓取物体插入具有位姿不确定性的占用槽位），高风险规避配置下实现82%成功率且零接触违规，而风险中性配置和机会约束基线分别为55%和50%成功率，且均产生非零外部接触力。

Conclusion: 提出的风险敏感信度空间MPPI框架能够在潜在参数不确定性下有效平衡性能与安全，通过CVaR约束提供可证明的安全保证，在安全关键应用中相比传统方法显著提升安全性同时保持良好性能。

Abstract: Many safety-critical control systems must operate under latent uncertainty that sensors cannot directly resolve at decision time. Such uncertainty, arising from unknown physical properties, exogenous disturbances, or unobserved environment geometry, influences dynamics, task feasibility, and safety margins. Standard methods optimize expected performance and offer limited protection against rare but severe outcomes, while robust formulations treat uncertainty conservatively without exploiting its probabilistic structure. We consider partially observed dynamical systems whose dynamics, costs, and safety constraints depend on a latent parameter maintained as a belief distribution, and propose a risk-sensitive belief-space Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control framework that plans under this belief while enforcing a Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) constraint on a trajectory safety margin over the receding horizon. The resulting controller optimizes a risk-regularized performance objective while explicitly constraining the tail risk of safety violations induced by latent parameter variability. We establish three properties of the resulting risk-constrained controller: (1) the CVaR constraint implies a probabilistic safety guarantee, (2) the controller recovers the risk-neutral optimum as the risk weight in the objective tends to zero, and (3) a union-bound argument extends the per-horizon guarantee to cumulative safety over repeated solves. In physics-based simulations of a vision-guided dexterous stowing task in which a grasped object must be inserted into an occupied slot with pose uncertainty exceeding prescribed lateral clearance requirements, our method achieves 82% success with zero contact violations at high risk aversion, compared to 55% and 50% for a risk-neutral configuration and a chance-constrained baseline, both of which incur nonzero exterior contact forces.

</details>


### [520] [Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03132)
*Ege Yuceel,Teodor Tchalakov,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于向量量化自编码器的控制方法，通过联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本，在保证安全性的前提下大幅减少控制信号数量，并在12维非线性四旋翼模型上验证了157倍码本压缩效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知预算下满足硬状态约束，但基于学习的控制器往往比安全操作所需复杂得多。本文旨在形式化这种差距，研究在采样数据控制下保持紧集前向不变性所需的不同控制信号数量。

Method: 提出向量量化自编码器联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本；开发基于Lipschitz可达集包络和平方和规划的迭代前向认证算法；将问题与信息论中的不变性熵概念联系起来。

Result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，学习到的控制器相比均匀网格基线实现了157倍的码本大小缩减，同时保持了不变性；实证表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率。

Conclusion: 该方法通过联合学习状态划分和控制码本，在保证安全约束的前提下显著降低了控制复杂度，为安全关键系统的资源高效控制提供了新思路。

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming.
