Abstract: Object manipulation is fundamental to virtual reality (VR) applications, yet conventional fingertip haptic devices fail to render certain tactile features relevant for immersive and precise interactions, as i.e. detection of edges. This paper presents a compact, lightweight fingertip haptic device (24.3 g) that delivers distinguishable surface and edge contact feedback through a novel dual-motor mechanism. Pressure distribution characterization using a 6 x 6 flexible sensor array demonstrates distinct contact patterns between the two stimulation modes. A preliminary user study with five participants achieved 93% average classification accuracy across four conditions (edge/surface contact with light/heavy pressure), with mean response times of 2.79 seconds. The results indicate that the proposed device can effectively convey edge and surface tactile cues, potentially enhancing object manipulation fidelity in VR environments.

</details>


### [711] [How to Train your Tactile Model: Tactile Perception with Multi-fingered Robot Hands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00744)
*Christopher J. Ford,Kaichen Shi,Laura Butcher,Nathan F. Lepora,Efi Psomopoulou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TacViT是一种基于视觉Transformer的新型触觉感知模型，旨在解决CNN在新触觉传感器部署时需大量传感器特定数据收集和重新训练的问题，通过自注意力机制实现对新传感器的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于CNN的触觉感知方法存在严重局限性：1) 需要大量传感器特定数据集；2) 对新传感器需重新训练，因为不同传感器在镜头特性、照明条件和传感器磨损方面存在差异；3) 这阻碍了触觉传感器在机器人操作中的快速部署和可扩展性。

Method: 提出TacViT模型，基于Vision Transformers架构，利用全局自注意力机制从触觉图像中提取鲁棒特征。该模型设计用于泛化到新传感器数据，减少对数据收集和重新训练的依赖。

Result: 在五指机器人手的传感器上评估TacViT，证明其在泛化性能上优于CNN。模型能够准确推断接触属性，即使在未见过的传感器上也能保持良好性能。

Conclusion: TacViT通过其泛化能力显著减少了新传感器部署所需的数据收集和训练时间，使触觉感知更具可扩展性和实用性，有望推动触觉传感在真实世界机器人应用中的发展。

Abstract: Rapid deployment of new tactile sensors is essential for scalable robotic manipulation, especially in multi-fingered hands equipped with vision-based tactile sensors. However, current methods for inferring contact properties rely heavily on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which, while effective on known sensors, require large, sensor-specific datasets. Furthermore, they require retraining for each new sensor due to differences in lens properties, illumination, and sensor wear. Here we introduce TacViT, a novel tactile perception model based on Vision Transformers, designed to generalize on new sensor data. TacViT leverages global self-attention mechanisms to extract robust features from tactile images, enabling accurate contact property inference even on previously unseen sensors. This capability significantly reduces the need for data collection and retraining, accelerating the deployment of new sensors. We evaluate TacViT on sensors for a five-fingered robot hand and demonstrate its superior generalization performance compared to CNNs. Our results highlight TacViTs potential to make tactile sensing more scalable and practical for real-world robotic applications.

</details>


### [712] [SoftHand Model-W: A 3D-Printed, Anthropomorphic, Underactuated Robot Hand with Integrated Wrist and Carpal Tunnel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00738)
*Dhillon B. Merritt,Christopher J. Ford,Haoran Li,Malia Smith,Zhixing Chen,Efi Psomopoulou,Nathan F. Lepora*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SoftHand Model-W：一款3D打印、欠驱动、拟人化机器人手，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度腕部，通过腕部驱动减少手臂补偿运动，提升操作效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软手设计通常缺乏腕部自由度，导致需要大量手臂补偿运动来完成操作任务，限制了操作效率和自然性。需要开发集成腕部驱动的软手系统以实现更接近人类的灵巧操作。

Method: 基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand开发3D打印的SoftHand Model-W，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度肌腱驱动腕部（屈伸和桡尺偏）。采用腕管式肌腱布线将电机远程放置在前臂，减少远端惯性。系统安装在6轴机器人手臂上，通过立方体堆叠和平面圆盘旋转任务测试手-臂协调性能。

Result: 与无腕部驱动相比，添加腕部驱动显著减少了任务完成时间、手臂关节行程和配置变化。腕部驱动减少了手臂的补偿和重新配置运动，使任务完成更快。腕部还实现了原本不可能的拾放操作。

Conclusion: SoftHand Model-W展示了近端自由度对于实现真实世界机器人应用中多功能、类人操作的关键作用。紧凑设计使其适用于研究和辅助场景，证明了集成腕部驱动对提升机器人操作性能的重要性。

Abstract: This paper presents the SoftHand Model-W: a 3D-printed, underactuated, anthropomorphic robot hand based on the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, with an integrated antagonistic tendon mechanism and 2 degree-of-freedom tendon-driven wrist. These four degrees-of-acuation provide active flexion and extension to the five fingers, and active flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation of the palm through the wrist, while preserving the synergistic and self-adaptive features of such SoftHands. A carpal tunnel-inspired tendon routing allows remote motor placement in the forearm, reducing distal inertia and maintaining a compact form factor. The SoftHand-W is mounted on a 6-axis robot arm and tested with two reorientation tasks requiring coordination between the hand and arm's pose: cube stacking and in-plane disc rotation. Results comparing task time, arm joint travel, and configuration changes with and without wrist actuation show that adding the wrist reduces compensatory and reconfiguration movements of the arm for a quicker task-completion time. Moreover, the wrist enables pick-and-place operations that would be impossible otherwise. Overall, the SoftHand Model-W demonstrates how proximal degrees of freedom are key to achieving versatile, human-like manipulation in real world robotic applications, with a compact design enabling deployment in research and assistive settings.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [713] [From LLM to Silicon: RL-Driven ASIC Architecture Exploration for On-Device AI Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07526)
*Ravindra Ganti,Steve Xu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的编译器，联合优化ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，支持3nm到28nm工艺节点，实现统一的PPA目标优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ASIC设计需要针对不同工艺节点进行手动调优，过程耗时且难以实现跨节点的自动化优化。需要一种能够联合优化架构、内存和计算划分的自动化方法。

Method: 将设计空间建模为混合离散-连续动作的马尔可夫决策过程，采用Soft Actor-Critic算法和专家混合门控机制，联合探索网格拓扑、核心微架构和算子放置。

Result: 在7个工艺节点上验证：Llama 3.1 8B FP16在3nm达到29809 tokens/秒；SmolVLM在所有节点功耗低于13mW（10MHz）。RL自动调整网格大小和每瓦配置，无需节点特定手动调优。

Conclusion: 提出的RL驱动编译器能够自动适应不同工艺节点，实现跨节点的统一PPA优化，显著减少手动调优工作量，为AI推理提供高效的设计自动化方案。

Abstract: We present an RL-driven compiler that jointly optimizes ASIC architecture, memory hierarchy, and workload partitioning for AI inference across 3nm to 28nm. The design space is formulated as a single Markov Decision Process with mixed discrete-continuous actions and a unified Power-Performance-Area (PPA) objective. Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Mixture-of-Experts gating explores the joint space of mesh topology, per-core microarchitecture, and operator placement. We validate on two workloads, Llama 3.1 8B FP16 (high-performance mode, 29809 tokens per second at 3nm) and SmolVLM (low-power mode, less than 13 mW at all nodes, 10 MHz). Across 7 process nodes, the RL automatically adapts mesh sizes and per-tile configurations, including heterogeneous FETCH, VLEN, and memory allocation without node-specific manual retuning.

</details>


### [714] [DHFP-PE: Dual-Precision Hybrid Floating Point Processing Element for AI Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04507)
*Shubham Kumar,Vijay Pratap Sharma,Vaibhav Neema,Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出一种支持FP8和FP4格式的双精度浮点MAC处理单元，采用创新的位分割技术实现单4位乘法器在FP8模式下作为4×4乘法器，在FP4模式下作为两个并行2×2乘法器，在28nm工艺下实现1.94GHz频率、0.00396mm²面积和2.13mW功耗，相比现有设计面积减少60.4%，功耗降低86.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能和边缘计算中低精度算术的快速普及，对能效高且灵活的浮点乘累加单元产生了强烈需求，特别是在低功耗和高吞吐量AI工作负载方面。

Method: 采用创新的位分割技术，使单个4位单元乘法器能够在FP8模式下作为标准4×4乘法器工作，在FP4模式下作为两个并行2×2乘法器工作，实现最大硬件利用率而无需重复逻辑。

Result: 在28nm工艺下实现，工作频率达1.94GHz，面积0.00396mm²，功耗2.13mW，相比最先进设计面积减少60.4%，功耗降低86.6%。

Conclusion: 该设计非常适合部署在大型加速器架构中，用于能源受限的AI推理和混合精度计算应用。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of low-precision arithmetic in artificial intelligence and edge computing has created a strong demand for energy-efficient and flexible floating-point multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. This paper presents a dual-precision floating-point MAC processing element supporting FP8 (E4M3, E5M2) and FP4 (2 x E2M1, 2 x E1M2) formats, specifically optimized for low-power and high-throughput AI workloads. The proposed architecture employs a novel bit-partitioning technique that enables a single 4-bit unit multiplier to operate either as a standard 4 x 4 multiplier for FP8 or as two parallel 2 x 2 multipliers for 2-bit operands, achieving maximum hardware utilization without duplicating logic. Implemented in 28 nm technology, the proposed PE achieves an operating frequency of 1.94 GHz with an area of 0.00396 mm^2 and power consumption of 2.13 mW, resulting in up to 60.4% area reduction and 86.6% power savings compared to state-of-the-art designs, making it well suited for energy-constrained AI inference and mixed-precision computing applications when deployed within larger accelerator architectures.

</details>


### [715] [CBM-Dual: A 65-nm Fully Connected Chaotic Boltzmann Machine Processor for Dual Function Simulated Annealing and Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06808)
*Kanta Yoshioka,Soshi Hirayae,Yuichiro Tanaka,Yuichi Katori,Takashi Morie,Hakaru Tamukoh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的数字混沌动力学处理器，同时支持模拟退火和储层计算，用于自主边缘AI的实时决策和轻量级适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自主边缘AI提供实时决策和轻量级适应能力，同时解决数字混沌动力学处理器的高计算和面积成本问题。

Method: 1) 利用混沌玻尔兹曼机固有的低神经元翻转率特性，设计专用调度器减少99%的乘累加操作；2) 采用高效的乘法分割方案减少59%的面积；3) 实现1024神经元全连接的混沌玻尔兹曼机。

Result: 在65nm工艺下实现12mm²芯片，同时执行异构任务，在模拟退火领域实现25-54倍提升，在储层计算领域实现4.5倍提升，达到最先进的能效。

Conclusion: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的双模数字混沌动力学处理器，通过创新调度和乘法分割方案显著降低计算和面积成本，为自主边缘AI提供了高效的实时决策和适应能力。

Abstract: This paper presents CBM-Dual, the first silicon-proven digital chaotic dynamics processor (CDP) supporting both simulated annealing (SA) and reservoir computing (RC). CBM-Dual enables real-time decision-making and lightweight adaptation for autonomous Edge AI, employing the largest-scale fully connected 1024-neuron chaotic Boltzmann machine (CBM). To address the high computational and area costs of digital CDPs, we propose: 1) a CBM-specific scheduler that exploits an inherently low neuron flip rate to reduce multiply-accumulate operations by 99%, and 2) an efficient multiply splitting scheme that reduces the area by 59%. Fabricated in 65nm (12mm$^2$), CBM-Dual achieves simultaneous heterogeneous task execution and state-of-the-art energy efficiency, delivering $\times$25-54 and $\times$4.5 improvements in the SA and RC fields, respectively.

</details>


### [716] [SHIELD: A Segmented Hierarchical Memory Architecture for Energy-Efficient LLM Inference on Edge NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07396)
*Jintao Zhang,Xuanyao Fong*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: SHIELD是一种针对边缘NPU上LLM推理的eDRAM架构，通过利用BF16激活值的生命周期和比特级敏感性，隔离符号/指数与尾数，对瞬态QO尾数禁用刷新，对持久KV尾数应用宽松刷新，减少35%的刷新能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘NPU上LLM推理受限于片上内存容量，高密度eDRAM适合存储激活工作空间但其周期性刷新消耗大量能量。现有工作主要关注减少片外流量或优化持久KV缓存的刷新，而忽略了瞬态且容错的查询和注意力输出激活。

Method: 提出SHIELD架构：1) 基于生命周期感知的分段eDRAM设计；2) 利用BF16激活值的时间驻留和比特级敏感性；3) 隔离符号和指数字段与尾数；4) 对瞬态QO尾数禁用刷新；5) 对持久KV尾数应用宽松刷新策略。

Result: 在多个LLM和推理场景下，SHIELD相比标准刷新基线减少eDRAM刷新能量35%，同时在WikiText-2、PIQA和ARC-Easy基准测试上保持精度。

Conclusion: SHIELD通过联合利用BF16激活值的时间驻留特性和比特级敏感性，有效解决了边缘NPU上LLM推理中eDRAM刷新能耗问题，为能量受限的边缘设备提供了高效的LLM推理解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference on edge Neural Processing Units (NPUs) is fundamentally constrained by limited on-chip memory capacity. Although high-density embedded DRAM (eDRAM) is attractive for storing activation workspaces, its periodic refresh consumes substantial energy. Prior work has primarily focused on reducing off-chip traffic or optimizing refresh for persistent Key-Value (KV) caches, while transient and error-resilient Query and Attention Output (QO) activations are largely overlooked. We propose SHIELD, a lifecycle-aware segmented eDRAM architecture that jointly exploits temporal residency and bit-level sensitivity in bfloat16 (BF16) activations. SHIELD isolates the sign and exponent fields from the mantissa, disables refresh for transient QO mantissas, and applies relaxed refresh to persistent KV mantissas. Across multiple LLMs and inference scenarios, SHIELD reduces eDRAM refresh energy by 35% relative to a standard-refresh baseline while preserving accuracy on WikiText-2, PIQA, and ARC-Easy.

</details>
